## рҹҸҶ SAVRЕ ENO BEZ IJEDNE GREЕ KE вҖ” 5-FAZNI PLAN (2026-06-26 15:42 UTC В· ACTIVE)

Boki direktiva (2026-06-26 13:15 UTC): *"mora da bude savrsen i da radi
savrseno bezijedne greske ikada. i bildovanje slot igre svih blokova i
tacne matematike"*.

Trigger u sesiji: 3-paralelni live probe otkrio P0 bug `i18n.mjs` NUL-byte
regex (svaki slot.html bacao `Invalid regular expression /[U+FFFD-U+001F]/g`
SyntaxError вҶ’ cells=0 grid collapse) + sintetiДҚki math probe drift
WoO +36.72 pp, Cash Eruption вҲ’29.28 pp, Huff +16.97 pp. Fix: `f6d3076`.

Cilj plana: ELIMINISATI svaku greЕЎku, dokazati sa real Playwright + real
sister-Rust mereno RTP, ne procene. Svaka faza dodaje novi verify gate
step koji blokira commit ako se regression vrati.

### рҹӣ  FAZA 1 вҖ” Zero-fault build (1 sesija В· ~2h)

**Cilj:** dokazati da svaki blok Г— svaki GDD Г— svaki state daje **0 JS
greЕЎaka, 0 unhandled rejection, validno DOM stanje** (reelsвүҘ3, cells>0,
balance reaguje na bet).

в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ ijedan GDD ima > 0 console.error / pageerror /            в”Ӯ block         в”Ӯ

в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**DoD:** `npm run verify` garantuje da **nikad viЕЎe neДҮe postojati
slot.html koji puca u browser-u**. Ako bilo koji blok unfreeze-uje
greЕЎku, gate blokira commit.

### рҹ§® FAZA 2 вҖ” TaДҚna matematika za sve blokove (2 sesije В· ~4h, ДҚeka T-1)

**Cilj:** RTP svake igre u Вұ0.05% bandu od deklariranog, **real engine
mereno**, ne procene. Pravi Rust kernel preko LV3-2 HTTP-a, ne sintetiДҚki
plugin-i.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ #   в”Ӯ Atom                                                      в”Ӯ Garancija     в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 2a  в”Ӯ Solver flip preko LV3-2 HTTP klijenta (sister bin radi    в”Ӯ ~1-3 ms/probe в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ kao long-lived daemon umesto CLI spawn po probe).         в”Ӯ 10 000Г— brЕҫe  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ Auto-converge se prebacuje sa `runOnce()` (CLI) na        в”Ӯ od trenutnog  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ `runOnceHttp()` (already shipped @ 83b3197).              в”Ӯ CLI spawn-a.  в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 2b  в”Ӯ Auto-converge gate: za svaki GDD sa declared RTP вҶ’        в”Ӯ Вұ0.05 % band  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ Newton ili Nelder-Mead dok delta вүӨ 0.05 pp ili max iter   в”Ӯ ili WARN sa   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ (2048). Receipt: `reports/math-converge/<slug>.json` sa   в”Ӯ honest gap    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ `declaredRtp`, `measuredRtp`, `iter`, `wilson_99`,        в”Ӯ surfaced.     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ `convergedBand`, `verdict`.                                в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 2c  в”Ӯ Per-feature math coverage:                                 в”Ӯ Per feature   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ   В· FS frequency (hits per 10M spins Вұ 1Пғ vs declared)    в”Ӯ trigger rates в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ   В· H&W trigger probability (vs Markov model)              в”Ӯ proven        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ   В· Multiplier ladder expected value (chain Г— stop prob)   в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ   В· Bonus buy RTP delta vs base game                       в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ   В· Scatter pay table sum (paylines Г— symbols Г— freq)      в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 2d  в”Ӯ Verify gate step 35 = "math-precision-band" вҖ” fail ako    в”Ӯ Pre-commit    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ ijedan baseline > Вұ0.05% delta. WARN za GDD-ove bez par   в”Ӯ block         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ sheet-a (oracle unavailable je dozvoljen samo van         в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ T-1 liste, sa explicit `NON_BINDING` verdict u receipt-u). в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**DoD:** za 5 T-1 igara `measured_rtp вҲҲ declared Вұ 0.0005` (real Rust
mereno). Per-feature trigger rates u Wilson 99% CI od declared. Bilo
koji slip kasnije = blokiran commit.

### рҹҺІ FAZA 3 вҖ” 338/338 igara pune kroz savrЕЎeni pipeline (1 sesija В· ~2h)

**Cilj:** sva trenutna korpusa (5 real + 25 reference + 308 sintetiДҚki)
prolazi Phase 1 + 2 gate-ove. Nove sintetiДҚke generiЕЎu po potrebi za
edge case (npr. mega-multipliers, cluster-pays sa H&W stacking).

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ #   в”Ӯ Atom                                                      в”Ӯ Garancija     в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 3a  в”Ӯ PAR sheet inference engine: za 333 GDD bez real par      в”Ӯ SintetiДҚki,   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ sheet-a, generiЕЎi approximate weights iz declared         в”Ӯ MARK kao      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ paytable + reel strips. `tools/par-sheet-inferred.mjs`.   в”Ӯ SYNTHESIZED.  в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 3b  в”Ӯ Per-GDD compliance scorecard вҖ” kombinuje V8 assembly +    в”Ӯ 1 strana po   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ V9 visual QA + V10..V12 industry specs + V14 math +       в”Ӯ GDD-u, regul- в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ phase 1 zero-fault + phase 2 RTP precision u jedinstveni  в”Ӯ ator-ready    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ "is this game ready to ship?" pass/warn/fail verdict.     в”Ӯ output        в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 3c  в”Ӯ Verify gate step 36 = "corpus-wide-perfect-pass" вҖ” fail   в”Ӯ Pre-commit    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ ako bilo koja od 338 igara ima > 0 P0/P1 nalaza po        в”Ӯ block         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ scorecard-u. SintetiДҚki RTP "INFORMATIONAL" za ne-T-1     в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ igre.                                                      в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**DoD:** 338/338 GDD u `reports/scorecard/<slug>.json` ima zelen pass
ili explicit, dokumentovan WARN.

### рҹҺҜ FAZA 4 вҖ” Adversarial fuzz + V9 vision (1 sesija В· ~3-4h, ДҚeka T-2)

**Cilj:** uhvatiti bug-ove koje deterministic verify ne vidi. 1000 random
GDD permutacija + vizuelna regression preko Opus vision API-ja.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ #   в”Ӯ Atom                                                      в”Ӯ Garancija     в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 4a  в”Ӯ `tools/_adversarial-fuzz.mjs` вҖ” random GDD permutation    в”Ӯ 1000 Г— full   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ generator: vary grid kind, paytable extremes, feature     в”Ӯ pipeline      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ combination explosions. Goal: trigger ANY block that      в”Ӯ smoke         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ doesn't crash on the 338 pin set.                         в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 4b  в”Ӯ V9 vision mode aktivacija (N+2 J): screenshot 5 stanja    в”Ӯ Vizuelna      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ Г— Opus vision rubrika sa cost cap $2.50/sesija. Surface   в”Ӯ regression    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ button overlap, text cutoff, kontrast < 4.5 kao FAIL.      в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 4c  в”Ӯ Verify gate step 37 = "adversarial-clean" вҖ” fail ako      в”Ӯ Pre-commit    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ 1000-permutation fuzz nalazi novi unhandled / crash       в”Ӯ block         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ pattern. Auto-extend antibody DB.                          в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### рҹҡҖ FAZA 5 вҖ” Continuous proof (1 sesija В· ~2h)

**Cilj:** garancija ne vaЕҫi samo u Boki-jevom terminalu вҖ” radi i u CI na
PR-u i na main pre push-a, sa istim 37-step verify gate-om.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ #   в”Ӯ Atom                                                      в”Ӯ Garancija     в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 5a  в”Ӯ N+2 H вҖ” GitHub Actions workflow (`ci.yml`):               в”Ӯ Svaki PR      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ   matrix: { node: [22, 24], os: [ubuntu, macos] }         в”Ӯ checked       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ   steps: install В· verify В· zero-fault В· math-precision В· в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ   adversarial-smoke (100 perm subset za CI brzinu).        в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 5b  в”Ӯ Branch protection: main zahteva CI green + 0 review-      в”Ӯ Push blocked  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ overrides. Sve PR-ove gate-uje 37-step verify.            в”Ӯ ako CI fail.  в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 5c  в”Ӯ Verify report u PR comment (status check API). Operator    в”Ӯ Vidljivost    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ vidi 37/37 zeleno pre merge-a, ne ДҚeka manual klik.       в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

LV3-8 closeout (2026-06-26): toggle UI live at uploader top header sa
mathBackendBadge + mathBackendToggle + announcer, poll svake 5s,
busy-guard + dynamic aria-label + UQ-LV3-QA-4 #2/#5/#9/#10 hardening.

LV3-14 closeout (2026-06-26): convergenceHud.mjs (382 LOC) wired in
buildSlotHTML.mjs (import + CSS + markup + runtime emit). Smart-default
auto-enable za GDD-ove sa compliance gate-ovima. Sister to liveRtpHud:
liveRtpHud = MEASURED-vs-DECLARED RTP per spin, convergenceHud =
auto-solver iter/residual/delta-bps band + terminal converged emit
preko HookBus.onSolverConverged.

UQ-LV3-QA-7 Wave 5 closeout (2026-06-26): cert-pack download je sad
<button> + fetch+Blob+save handler (was <a download>). Error responses
viЕЎe ne otvaraju JSON tab вҖ” idu na SR announcer + button label
("failed вң—" 4s grace). Busy-guard za double-click, slug fixed pri
click-time, Content-Type sniff za ZIP-vs-JSON, URL.revokeObjectURL
posle save.

LV3 today: LV3-10 + LV3-11 вҖ” E2E RTP probe + shared anti-vendor
sanitization registry sa 12-case contract test.

LV3-2 closeout (2026-06-26 14:30 UTC):
  sister `rust-sim/src/http_server.rs` (Axum library module) + `rust-sim/
  src/bin/http_server.rs` (clap binary, --features http gate). Endpoints:
    GET  /health         engine name/version/uptime/counters
    GET  /default-config GameConfig::default() as JSON (test helper)
    POST /spin           one MC run, returns rtp/hits/spins/hit_rate +
                         canonical SUMMARY|rtp=...|hits=...|spins=... line
    POST /batch          N independent runs, preserves item id order,
                         optional stop_on_error short-circuit
  Hardening: loopback-only bind default (refuses public IPs without
  --allow-public-bind), per-request total-spin cap + seed cap + batch
  cap + body-size cap + global in-flight semaphore, u64 overflow check,
  spawn_blocking off the tokio reactor so rayon MC kernel doesn't starve
  request handlers. Output contract carries the same three keys the
  LV3-1 _findSummary parser already speaks so transitional callers stay
  on the SUMMARY string without code change. Slot-gdd-factory side:
  `tools/sister-rust-http-client.mjs` (spawn READY-line parser + fetch
  helpers) + `tests/_sisterRustHttpClient.test.mjs` (10-case contract
  suite, live tests skip cleanly when sister binary isn't built).
  Tests: 12/12 Rust unit + 5/5 Rust bin loopback policy + 11/11 JS live
  contract + verify ALL GATES GREEN (33 gates).
  Hash pin: sister @ ca6c56e3 + factory @ 83b3197.

UQ-LV3-QA-1 (LV3-2 post-landing audit, 2026-06-26 15:00 UTC):
  3-paralelni Explore agent audit (Rust server / JS client / cross-repo
  contract). Rust + cross-repo: ZERO real issues across 6 audit vectors.
  JS client: 2 real catches, both fixed in factory @ 3f38c84:
    P0 вҖ” stale stdout listener leak on spawnHttpServer timeout race.
         Hoisted onData out of Promise constructor so the timeout catch
         block + SIGTERM/SIGKILL fallback always uninstall it via a
         single detachOnData() helper. Listener now removed in every
         terminal path (READY, 4-KiB cap, child exit, timeout, catch).
    P1 вҖ” runOnceHttp hitRate diverged from LV3-1 formula. LV3-1 returns
         hits / config.spins; the server returns winning_spins /
         total_spins (= spins_per_seed Г— num_seeds). For seeds>1 the two
         drift by exactly the seeds factor вҖ” a silent 10Г— math error
         risk for callers using hitRate for convergence calibration. Fix:
         runOnceHttp now prefers LV3-1 formula when caller supplies
         opts.spins; falls back to server-side hit_rate only when no
         caller-supplied budget exists. runBatchHttp unaffected.
  Tests: 11/11 (added "runOnceHttp hitRate matches LV3-1 formula"
  regression guard). Verify ALL 33 GATES GREEN.
  Items NOT fixed (documented, low priority):
    - Rust server semaphore drop is RAII-bound to handler future, not
      to the spawn_blocking task. Permit released on client disconnect
      but the MC task keeps running in the background. Acceptable for
      loopback-only deployment; revisit if exposing to LAN.
    - Tests/skip-as-pass on missing binary is intentional (LV3-1 uses
      the same pattern). CI gate around the binary build enforces
      presence вҖ” not the JS suite.
    - 4 KiB READY-line buffer cap may be tight if future binaries add
      a banner. Raise when/if that happens.
```

(HTTP RTT) preko `sister-rust-http-client.mjs`.

## рҹҡҖ N+2 ULTIMATE AUTONOMY BACKLOG вҖ” 2026-06-23 14:36 UTC В· OTVOREN

Boki direktiva (14:35): *"sta je ostalo za slot gdd da ga dovedes do
ultimativne autonomnosti, a da radi sve sam i izuetno savrseno?"* + *"ajde
to detaljno zapisi u master todo i samo to radimo detaljno dok ne bude
savrseno"*.

**Cilj:** Operator drop-uje GDD (PDF / MD / JSON / URL) **opciono uz PAR
sheet (XLSX / CSV)** i pipeline **sam** dovrЕЎi do playable slot HTML +
math precision band Вұ0.05% + V8 receipt + V9 verdict + regulator
deliverable, **bez ruДҚne intervencije i bez prekida** ДҚak i kad parser
inicijalno fail-uje.

Sve stavke u ovom backlog-u rade se redom (D вҶ’ J) sa
**ultimate-level QA** (paralelni audit agenti + cortex-eye verifikacija +
verify gate idempotency + anti-vendor lint + post-commit re-verify).

в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  i otvara slot u iframe-u. Sve CLI tool-ovi ostaju u igri,   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  UI je samo facade.                                          в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  Е TA POSTOJI:                                                в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   - tools/web-dashboard.mjs (static read-only view)         в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   - tools/ingest.mjs (CLI batch processor)                   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  Е TA TREBA:                                                 в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   1. tools/web-uploader-server.mjs: minimal Node HTTP server в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      (port 5181), no framework. Endpoints:                   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      - POST /ingest (multipart): primi PDF + opcioni PAR,   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ        emit SSE stream sa per-step progress                 в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      - GET /preview/<slug>: serve dist/ingest/<slug>/        в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ        index.html                                            в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      - GET /report/<slug>: V8+V9+PAR receipt JSON           в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   2. tools/web-uploader-ui.html: SPA sa drag-drop zone,     в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      progress timeline (parser/V8/V9/build), receipt panels,в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      iframe preview. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, bez framework-a.  в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   3. Security: only-localhost bind (127.0.0.1), no auth     в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      potrebno za local-only, max upload size 50 MB          в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   4. CSP: strict (no inline JS, no eval, file:// safe)      в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   5. Verify gate step 4.97y33                               в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   6. Contract test: spawn server na ephemeral port-u,       в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      POST real PDF, assert SSE events arrive u redu, assert в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      preview servisira valid HTML                           в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   7. Cortex-eye headless probe: real browser sesija sa      в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      drag-drop simulation (Playwright)                       в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  RISK: file upload streaming (multipart parser), race kod   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  paralelnih uploadova (slug collision вҖ” koristi UUID po     в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  upload-u), SSE drop kod sporog browsera (keep-alive ping). в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ G  в”Ӯ Auto-scaffold za nov feature kind                           в”Ӯ  ~2-3h в”Ӯ рҹ“Ӣ PLAN   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  CILJ: Kad GDD navede feature kind koji NE postoji u block   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  catalog-u, pipeline ne baca "unknownFeatureKinds" вҖ” auto-   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  poziva scaffold-block sa pametnim default-om, generiЕЎe     в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  stub blok + test fixture, doda u backlog za code review.    в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  Е TA POSTOJI:                                                в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   - tools/scaffold-block.mjs (25 archetypes, manual call)   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   - src/registry/featureArchetypes.mjs (kind вҶ’ archetype map)в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   - smartDefaults stage 5 archetype backfill                в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  Е TA TREBA:                                                 в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      Step 4 вҖ” posle parser-a, dijagnostikuje unknown kinds   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   2. Nepoznata kind вҶ’ fuzzy-match na archetype catalog,      в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      ako match confidence вүҘ 0.7 вҖ” scaffold-block sa tim     в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      archetype-om, ime stuba = `<slug>-<kind>.mjs`           в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   3. Stub blok pojavljuje u `src/blocks/_auto-scaffolded/`  в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      sa `@status STUB` u JSDoc header-u + auto-generisanim   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      defaultConfig + emit CSS/Runtime stub                  в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   4. Backlog log: reports/auto-scaffold-pending.json       в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      lista svih stub-ova sa "needs review" flag-om           в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   5. Dashboard: alert sekcija "N nov(ih) blok(a) auto-      в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      generisanih, klikni za review"                         в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   6. Verify gate step 4.97y34                               в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   7. Contract test: synthetic GDD sa unknown kind вҶ’         в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      assert stub fajl kreiran + log entry dodaСӮ              в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  RISK: explosion of stub blokova (sigurnosni cap: max 5 po  в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  ingestu, ostalo log-uje bez kreiranja); naming collision   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ H  в”Ӯ CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions)                             в”Ӯ  ~2h   в”Ӯ рҹ“Ӣ PLAN   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  CILJ: PR вҶ’ verify gate auto-run. Post-merge na main вҶ’       в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  baseline portfolio rebuild + dashboard auto-deploy na       в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      test, anti-vendor lint, comment PR sa rezultatima      в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      deploy-pages action                                     в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      keys (Kimi/Opus run-uje samo lokalno, ne u CI)         в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ

в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ J  в”Ӯ V9 vision mode aktivacija (cost-capped)                     в”Ӯ  ~3-4h в”Ӯ рҹ“Ӣ PLAN   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  CILJ: V9 deterministic deo hvata struct invariants ali NE   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  CSS regression. Vision mode (Opus 4.8 image input) hvata    в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  "button overlap", "text cutoff", "low contrast" вҖ” sve ЕЎto   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  deterministic ne vidi.                                      в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  Е TA POSTOJI:                                                в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   - tools/v9-visual-qa.mjs: visionMode() funkcija (veДҮ       в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ     postoji, opt-in via --vision flag, SKIP-uje ako Fable   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ     wrapper missing)                                         в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   - Playwright (vec instaliran preko D-10 brutalan probe)   в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  Е TA TREBA:                                                 в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   1. TCC vision=ON akcija (macOS Settings вҶ’ Privacy вҶ’       в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      Screen Recording grant za terminal/iTerm) вҖ” Boki       в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      operator akcija, dokumentovati u README                в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   2. v9-visual-qa.mjs --vision: za top 10 baseline-a +      в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      svaki 10. synthetic, sample 5 screenshots/game (base    в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      idle, big win, FS intro, paytable open, settings)      в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   3. Opus vision call sa rubrikom (button overlap, text     в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      cutoff, contrast ratio вүҘ 4.5, no covered hub controls) в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   4. Cost gate: max 50 vision call po sesiji (~$0.05/poziv  в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      = $2.50 cap), env CORTEX_V9_VISION_CAP override        в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   5. Receipt: v9-vision.json sa per-state findings           в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   6. Dashboard panel proЕЎirenje: vision findings sekcija    в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   7. Verify gate step 4.97y36 (skip ako TCC ne grant-ovan, в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ      ne FAIL вҖ” vision je opt-in, ne mandatory)              в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  RISK: TCC dialog blocker (Boki mora click "Allow"), Fable в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  wrapper API drift, cost overrun (hard cap), CSS regression в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  false positive na "valid darker theme intentional".         в”Ӯ        в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ

### Redosled rada

**Prioritet 1 (DO ULTIMATE AUTONOMY):**
1. **D** вҖ” PAR auto-ingest (zatvara math autonomy gap, najvaЕҫnije)
2. **E** вҖ” Self-healing parser (zatvara robustness gap)

**Prioritet 2 (UX + ops):**
3. **F** вҖ” Web UI (production-feel UX)
4. **H** вҖ” CI/CD (convenience)

**Prioritet 3 (insurance + bonus):**
5. **G** вҖ” Auto-scaffold (autonomy bonus)
6. **I** вҖ” Schema versioning (insurance)
7. **J** вҖ” V9 vision mode (CSS catch)

### Ultimate-level QA protokol (svaki D-J atom)

Svaki ID prolazi kroz **ISTI** ultimate workflow kao A/B/C iz N+1:

1. **Implementacija** вҖ” tool + integracija u postojeДҮi pipeline
2. **Contract test** вҖ” 10+ assertions, real fixtures (ne mock-ovi)
3. **Verify gate step** вҖ” dodaje se u tools/verify.mjs
4. **Paralelni audit agenti** вҖ” 2-3 nezavisna agenta ДҚitaju kod + traЕҫe
   rupe, izveЕЎtaj sa fajl+linija+simptom+fix predlog
5. **Audit fix-evi** вҖ” sve nalaze applique-am pre commit-a
6. **Anti-vendor lint** вҖ” grep za zabranjene vendor termine
7. **Cortex-eye headless verifikacija** вҖ” gde primenljivo (Web UI / V9)
8. **`npm run verify`** вҖ” 100% green pre commit
9. **`verify-idempotency-test`** вҖ” Pass 1 = Pass 2
10. **Commit + push + post-commit re-verify**

Verify gate step **4.97y32** dodat. Verifikacija sa
`tests/contracts/uq-deep-b-hardening.test.mjs` В· 11/11 PASS.

### Glavni catch UQ-DEEP-B

CRIT #5 fix iz UQ-DEEP-A bio je **placebo**: `acquireLock(outDir + '.lock')`
pozivao `fileLock.mjs` koji **interno dodaje `.lock`** вҖ” realni lock fajl
bio je `<outDir>.lock.lock`, a ne `<outDir>.lock`. Mutual exclusion NIJE
PRESERVED jer su dva paralelna ingesta sa istim slugom oba kreirala svoj
distinkt lock fajl. To je taДҚno pattern "defenzivni kod uvodi novu
failure mode-u" koji sam predvideo u prvom krugu вҖ” drugi krug ga je
operacionalno potvrdio.

### Poreklo pravila "drugi krug audit-a OBAVEZAN"

Pravilo se aktivira posle SVAKE round-a fix-eva nad audit nalazima:
1. Krug N reЕЎava M nalaza
2. Krug N+1 proverava DA LI fix iz kruga N je sam dao nove rupe
3. Nastavi do nula novih nalaza
4. Tek tada smatraj zatvoreno

Ostavlja brain trace + verify gate step kao osiguranje pre commit-a.

### One-command total audit (operator quick reference)

```bash
# Single-pane production status (4 sections + GREEN/AMBER/RED verdict):
node tools/audit-summary.mjs

# Individual sections:
node tools/per-game-kernel-coverage.mjs         # per-game walker
node tools/kernel-applicability-matrix.mjs      # cross-game matrix
node tools/portfolio-report.mjs                 # dashboard rollup
node tools/declared-vs-measured-audit.mjs       # verdict ladder

# Kernel-level operations:
node tools/slot-math-kernel.mjs list            # 22 kernels discovery
node tools/slot-math-kernel.mjs info <kernel>   # metadata
node tools/slot-math-kernel.mjs call <k> cfg    # forward RTP call
node tools/slot-math-kernel.mjs solve <k> cfg   # inverse solve
```

## рҹҸҶ AUDIT SUMMARY вҖ” 2026-06-23 В· ZATVOREN вң… (one-command total rollup)

Boki direktiva: *"dalje"*. ONE-COMMAND TOTAL AUDIT вҖ” orchestrator koji
programatski poziva sve 4 audit alata (coverage + matrix + portfolio +
verdict) i agregira u jedan ASCII rollup sa overallVerdict ladder-om
(GREEN / AMBER / RED).

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ

в”Ӯ                                                                                в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ                                  matrix, portfolio, verdict } }               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    renderAuditSummary(s)     вҶ’ ASCII rollup (4 numbered sections + banner)    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  CLI:                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    node tools/audit-summary.mjs              # 5 baselines, ASCII             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    node tools/audit-summary.mjs --json       # JSON only                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    node tools/audit-summary.mjs --strict     # exit 1 if !== GREEN            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ    рҹҹў GREEN  вҖ” 100% coverage + verdict ok + portfolioVerdict=CONVERGED        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    рҹҹЎ AMBER  вҖ” close / unknown / partial coverage / no cross-game report     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    рҹ”ҙ RED    вҖ” portfolioVerdict=DIVERGED (any game)                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ                                                                                в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ    вң“ Section 2 (matrix) has all required fields                               в”Ӯ

## рҹҸҶ DECLARED-VS-MEASURED AUDIT вҖ” 2026-06-23 В· ZATVOREN вң… (verdict ladder + portfolio aggregate)

Boki direktiva: *"dalje"*. Production-grade audit: declared RTP vs
measured RTP po svakoj igri sa verdict ladder-om (CONVERGED Вұ0.5pp /
CLOSE Вұ2pp / DIVERGED). Plus aggregate portfolioVerdict.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ

в”Ӯ                                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Exports:                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    classify(rtpDelta)        вҶ’ CONVERGED / CLOSE / DIVERGED / UNKNOWN         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    buildAudit(payload, src)  вҶ’ { rows, verdictCounts, portfolioVerdict }      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    renderAudit(audit)        вҶ’ ASCII verdict ladder                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    findLatestReport()        вҶ’ latest reports/cross-game-rtp/*.json           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ    node tools/declared-vs-measured-audit.mjs --json         # JSON only       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    node tools/declared-vs-measured-audit.mjs --strict       # exit 1 if any   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                DIVERGED       в”Ӯ

## рҹҸҶ PER-GAME KERNEL COVERAGE вҖ” 2026-06-23 В· ZATVOREN вң… (auto-discovery walker)

Boki direktiva: *"cepaj do kraja sve sto ima, nemoj da stajes"*. SledeДҮa
operator-facing tool posle slot-math-kernel CLI: **per-game kernel coverage
walker** вҖ” za svaku baseline GDD identifikuje SVE sister-repo kernels koji
se primenjuju (topology + features match) i poziva ih, emituje per-game
report sa analytical RTP per applicable kernel.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  tools/per-game-kernel-coverage.mjs                                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  tests/contracts/per-game-kernel-coverage.test.mjs                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Exports:                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    topologyHints(model)       вҶ’ Set<topology-hint>                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      reads BOTH kind AND evaluation (Gates: kind=rectangular,                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      evaluation=pay_anywhere вҖ” oba seed-uju hint set)                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    applicableKernels(model)   вҶ’ Array<KernelMetadata>                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    walkGame(slug)             вҶ’ { ok, topology, kernelsApplicable,            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                   kernelsOk, totalAnalyticalSumXBet,          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                   kernels: [{ name, ok, rtpContribution }] } в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  CLI:                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    node tools/per-game-kernel-coverage.mjs                  # 5 baselines     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    node tools/per-game-kernel-coverage.mjs --slug X         # single game     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    node tools/per-game-kernel-coverage.mjs --slugs A,B,C    # custom set      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  OUTPUT:                                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    reports/per-game-kernel-coverage/<slug>.json                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    reports/per-game-kernel-coverage/_summary-<ts>.json                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Live run (5/5 baselines):                                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    вң“ cash-eruption-foundry-gdd  (lock_respin, 9/11 kernels, ОЈ 2.90Г— bet)     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    вң“ huff-n-more-puff-gdd       (lines,       7/9  kernels, ОЈ ...Г— bet)      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    вң“ starlight-travellers-gdd   (cluster,    11/13 kernels, ОЈ 14.07Г— bet)    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    вң“ wrath-of-olympus-gdd       (cluster,    11/13 kernels, ОЈ ...Г— bet)      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    вң“ gates-of-olympus-1000-gdd  (rectangular,13/15 kernels, ОЈ 6.05Г— bet)     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Contract test: 7/7 PASS                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    вң“ topologyHints returns Set with topology + features                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    вң“ applicableKernels(starlight model) includes cluster_pays                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    вң“ walkGame(cash-eruption) returns ok with kernelsOk > 0                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    вң“ walkGame(starlight) detects cluster topology                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    вң“ walkGame(gates) detects pay_anywhere applicability                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    вң“ walkGame() reports inverse-solver kernels as skipped, not failed         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    вң“ All 5 baselines walk to ok=true                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Wired u verify gate step 4.97y13.                                             в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**Operator value:** apples-to-apples audit вҖ” "za igru X, evo SVIH kernels
koji dotiДҚu njenu mehaniku + analytical RTP doprinos svakog". Kernels koji
ne pripadaju topologiji (npr. cluster_pays za rectangular igru) tiho se
filtriraju; inverse-solveri (operator-driven) eksplicitno oznaДҚeni kao
skipped sa razlogom, ne failed.

## рҹҸҶ FINAL SWEEP вҖ” 2026-06-23 В· SVE STAVKI ZATVORENO вң… (A/B/C/D вҖ” 35 new asserts, 4 new contract suites)

Boki direktiva: *"nema bre drugi projekat, ovaj mora da se zavrsi prvo. ajde cepaj do kraja sve sto ima, nemoj da stajes"*. Sve 4 preostale "produktivne ali blocked" stavke pretvorene u live kernels + contracts:

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ ID   в”Ӯ Stavka                                                       в”Ӯ Status    в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ A    в”Ӯ Slingo closed-form analytical RTP (D+4)                      в”Ӯ 8/8 вң…    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ src/blocks/featureSimPlugins/slingoKernelBridge.mjs          в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ tests/contracts/slingo-kernel-bridge.test.mjs                в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ Vendor-neutral closed-form (linearity-of-expectation +       в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ line-completion probability). Same API shape as cluster +    в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ H&W kernel bridges вҶ’ uniform consumer via --kernel-preflight.в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ B    в”Ӯ Synthetic-RTP fallback (D+5)                                 в”Ӯ 7/7 вң…    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ src/parser.mjs::extractPaybackProseMode                      в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ tests/contracts/synthetic-rtp-fallback.test.mjs              в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ Template-wide: any GDD sa known topology ali bez explicit    в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ RTP-a u prose dobija industry-baseline 96.0% + rtpSource=    в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ 'synthetic-fallback-96' (operator-audit flag). Explicit RTP  в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ uvek wins. Unknown topology ostaje null (no false-confidence).в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө

## рҹҺҜ MATH UNIVERSAL ENGINE вҖ” 3 ARHITEKTONSKE OPCIJE В· 2026-06-22 В· DECISION GATE

Boki: *"mislis da je pametno da napravimo localnog agenta koji ce po pravilima
i sa znanjem o matematici kao nas slot math agent uvek precizno koristiti slot
matematiku i uvek precizno ubacivati matematiku iz gdda? da li je to bolje
resenje od ovog koje imamo ili nesto trece?"* + *"upisi i to u master todo
detaljno"*.

### Trenutno stanje (MATH-PRECISION-5 zatvoren @ `b163359`)

Cash Eruption probe metrics:
- HF measured 18.70% / declared 19.03% / О” **вҲ’0.33 pp** (45Г— tighter posle real payline map)
- RTP measured 11.85% / declared 41.90% base / О” вҲ’30 pp
- Gap razlozi: Pattern Win + Wild expansion + Volcano scatter logic + Hold & Win Fireball collect + FS round simulation

### Komparativna procena (honest, no preference)

| Faktor                          | A: Deterministic | B: Local Agent | C: Sister Bridge |
|:--------------------------------|:----------------:|:--------------:|:----------------:|
| Time-to-first-result            | вҡЎ ~3.5h         | рҹҹЎ ~10h        | рҹҹЎ ~9h           |
| Precision Вұ0.05% achievable     | вқҢ               | рҹҹЎ maybe       | вң…               |
| Universal (any GDD + par sheet) | рҹҹЎ per-feature   | вң… rule-driven  | вң… Rust author    |
| Vendor-neutral                  | вң…               | вң…              | вң…                |
| LLM cost                        | вң… 0             | рҹҹЎ opt-in only  | вң… 0              |
| Maintenance scaling             | вқҢ per-feature   | вң… per-rule     | вң… Rust core      |
| MVP/lite preserved              | вң…               | вң…              | вқҢ deps           |
| Audit trail                     | рҹҹЎ probe log    | вң… rule MDs     | вң… Rust cert      |

### Execution sequence (Boki: "kreni redom")

**OPCIJA A** prvo (najkraДҮi time-to-result, block-by-block):

1. **A-1 Pattern Win plugin** вҖ” Red7 reel 1 stack + Wilds 2-5 вҶ’ 1000Г— total bet (~30m)
2. **A-2 Wild expansion** вҖ” only_if_winning re-evaluate (~45m)
3. **A-3 Volcano scatter handler** вҖ” 3=2Г—, 4=15Г—, 5=100Г— (~20m)
4. **A-4 H&W Fireball collect plugin** вҖ” 40.91% RTP contribution (~60m)
5. **A-5 FS round simulation** вҖ” 6 spins + retrigger (~45m)
6. **A-6 5-main verify + self-tests** вҖ” measure gap closure (~30m)

Posle A: re-eval gap; ako Вұ0.5% ne dosegnemo вҶ’ B (rule agent) ili C (Rust bridge).

**FEAT-SIM acceptance**: Cash Eruption probe measured RTP вҲҲ [95.95%, 96.05%] (Вұ0.05% per Boki direktiva). FS round + H&W collect prati real GDD В§4.2 breakdown (41.90 + 40.91 + 7.00 + 6.19 = 96%). Probe je sad regulator-grade, ne heuristiДҚko.

### Redosled izvrЕЎavanja (ZAVRЕ AVAM REDOM)

1. **D-4 вҶ’ D-17** (Grana A, ~9h) вҖ” close Cash Eruption parser drift. Surgical parser.mjs edits.
2. **HYB-1 вҶ’ HYB-5** (Grana B, ~12h) вҖ” multi-vendor support. Univerzalna arhitektura.
3. **FS-1 вҶ’ FS-7** (Grana C, ~10h) вҖ” feature-faithful simulator. Sister repo kernel hookup.

**Ukupno: ~31h AI rad za "any par Г— any GDD" full coverage.**

Procena posle svake grane:
- Posle A: 17/17 field parity Cash Eruption, deterministiДҚki put, regex-only
- Posle B: novi vendor PDF/xlsx вҶ’ 70%+ deterministic + 30% LLM fallback вҶ’ 100% faithful
- Posle C: measured RTP Вұ0.05% sa real feature simulation, regulator-grade

za math. i daj mi feed back sta sve treba da radis"*.

Math je **UNLOCKED** od 2026-06-22 (CLAUDE.md HARD RULE #4 stari "math
OFF-LIMITS" viЕЎe ne vaЕҫi вҖ” Boki je dao green light). Cilj: slot prelazi iz
demo mode (vizuelno funkcionalan + uniform RNG) u **statistiДҚki ispravan
real-money-capable simulator** koji moЕҫe da proД‘e GLI-19/UKGC RTS audit.

### MATH-FINISH wave (MATH-11 вҶ’ MATH-12) вҖ” compliance gate + QA

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Tag     в”Ӯ Naslov                                                 в”Ӯ Trajanje в”Ӯ Fajlovi                      в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ј:в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ:в”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ MATH-11 в”Ӯ V14 math compliance walker (V11/V12 ali sa REAL RTP)   в”Ӯ  ~1h     в”Ӯ tools/v14-math-compliance    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ Sad V11 I1.1 RTP-floor je SKIP-AKO-NULL (jer su null). в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ tests/tools/v14.test.mjs     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ V14 pali na REAL deklarisani + REAL measured RTP.       в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ 5 main games PASS, V11/V12 ostaju.                      в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ                             в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ј:в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ:в”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ MATH-12 в”Ӯ Math QA test suite                                      в”Ӯ  ~1h     в”Ӯ tests/math/*.test.mjs (3-4   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ - rtp-determinism: 2Г— run sa istim seed-om = identical  в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ test fajla)                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ - hit-frequency: measured HF Вұ2% od declared              в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ - per-spin-time: worst-case < 16ms (60fps budget)         в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ - paytable-coverage: every declared symbol pay reachable в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ                             в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Procena ukupno
- MATH-CORE: ~5h (6 stavki)
- MATH-INTEG: ~4.5h (4 stavki)
- MATH-FINISH: ~2h (2 stavki)
- **Total: ~11.5h za 12 stavki** (3 wave-a, svaki sa commit + verify + push)

### Acceptance kriterijum (ZATVOREN MATH = sledeДҮe vaЕҫi)
- 5 main games imaju measured RTP within Вұ2% od declared
- 5 main games imaju measured volatility within Вұ1 od declared
- 5 main games imaju PAR sheet xlsx output (regulator-grade)
- V14 compliance walker prolazi 338/338 (sa main 5 koji imaju real math)
- Verify gate skaДҚe na ~36 step

(single-provider Kimi baseline) sa A/B/C scoring matrix preko N providera.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ WAVE UQ-TRAIN-2 вҖ” Multi-provider Agent Trainer V2                                         в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ NOVI ALAT                                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/agent-trainer-v2-multiprovider.mjs (~200 LOC) вҖ” pure deterministic               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   scoring na postojeДҮim V6 cache snapshot-ima                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ PROVIDER SNAPSHOTS                                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   opus   tools/_wave-v-cache/                  (Opus 4.8 baseline od UQ-OPUS)            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   kimi   tools/_wave-v-cache-kimi-archive/     (placeholder, NOT u use)                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   gpt    tools/_wave-v-cache-gpt-archive/      (future)                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   gemini tools/_wave-v-cache-gemini-archive/   (future)                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ SCORING per lane                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   ratioScore  = clamp01(declaredRatio)                                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   volumeScore = clamp01(declaredCount / 80)                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   lane_score  = 0.5 Г— ratioScore + 0.5 Г— volumeScore                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   winner-per-lane = provider sa max avg score across 5 main slugs                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   globalni winner = provider sa najviЕЎe lane wins                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ TRENUTNO STANJE                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   opus      5/5 snapshots (100%)                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   kimi      0/5 (archive nije snimljen)                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   gpt       0/5 (not in use)                                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   gemini    0/5 (not in use)                                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Winner per lane: opus na V1..V5 (avg score 0.544)                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Globalni winner: opus                                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ USAGE                                                                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   node tools/agent-trainer-v2-multiprovider.mjs                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   node tools/agent-trainer-v2-multiprovider.mjs --providers=opus,kimi                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   node tools/agent-trainer-v2-multiprovider.mjs --strict                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ SELF-TEST (tests/tools/agent-trainer-v2.test.mjs)                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   - 5/5 slug mapping iz fixture key-eva (FIXTURE_KEY вҶ’ cache-slug-format)                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   - 4/4 availability matrix popunjen                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   - Winner per lane = provider sa max avg score                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   - Global winner = provider sa najviЕЎe lane wins                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   - --strict mode prolazi kad Opus dostupan                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   - --providers=opus jednoprovider run OK                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ READY-FOR-GPT/GEMINI                                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Kad postanu dostupni, samo se snimi `_wave-v-cache-gpt-archive/<slug>.json`            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   i alat ih ukljuДҚi u scoring matrix bez ikakve izmene koda.                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ GATE INTEGRATION                                                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/verify.mjs step 4.98 вҖ” UQ-TRAIN-2 trainer V2 self-test                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ

## рҹҸҶ WAVE UQ-FORTIFY9 вҖ” 5 NINTH-TIER FORENSIC AUDIT FIXES В· 2026-06-22 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"kreni redom ultimativno"* вҖ” opcija D. Nezavisni Explore agent
forensic audit otkrio 5 stvarnih production rupa koje su preЕҫivele
UQ-FORTIFY 1..8 + UQ-COVER + UQ-MASTERY 1..6.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ WAVE UQ-FORTIFY9 вҖ” 5 ninth-tier forensic fix-eva                                         в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ #1 XSS U BUILDSLOTHTML.MJS                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    JSON.stringify direktan u <script> bez escape. model.name sa                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    "</script><script>alert(1)</script>" вҶ’ izvrЕЎen XSS u rendered slot-u.                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    Fix: safeJSONInScript() helper escape-uje <, >, &, U+2028, U+2029                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    u \\u003c, \\u003e, \\u0026, \\u2028, \\u2029. Validan JSON za runtime parser,       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    ali browser HTML parser ne vidi `<`. Primenjen na __MODEL_NAME__,                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    __MODEL_FEATURES__, __MODEL_SYMBOL_COUNTS__, SYMBOL_REGISTRY, FREESPINS.              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ #2 PROTOTYPE POLLUTION U MERGEINTOMODEL + PARSER INLINE                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    V6 delta dolazi iz LLM (Kimi/Opus). Object.assign(model[k], delta[k]) gde            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    delta sadrЕҫi __proto__ ili constructor key korumpira Object.prototype globalno.      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    Pre fix-a: delta={"__proto__":{"isAdmin":true}} вҶ’ svaki novi {} dobija .isAdmin.     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    Fix: PROTO_POISON_KEYS = {__proto__, constructor, prototype}; filter top-level       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    i nested keys pre Object.assign. Implementiran u src/wave-v-reconcile.mjs            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    mergeIntoModel + src/parser.mjs inline overlay merge.                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ #3 DST/NTP CLOCK SKEW U FILELOCK.MJS                                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    Math.abs(mtimeMs - meta.acquiredAt) > 1000 moЕҫe biti 0 pod backward time             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    jump (NTP correction, DST fall-back). Lock se nikad ne kradne вҶ’                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    deadlock 338-concurrent ingest.                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    Fix: dodato eksplicitno pravilo "ako je recordedAgeMs negativan (clock skok          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    unazad) ILI je ageMs > maxAge regardless of recordedAgeMs вҶ’ force steal".            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ #4 BOM + JSON PARSE SILENT FALLBACK U PARSER.MJS                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    Original BOM strip rukovao samo UTF-8 (0xFEFF). UTF-16 LE BOM (0xFFFE)               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    je padao kroz, parser tretirao kao text, JSON.parse failed, silent fall-             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    back u markdown parser (lower fidelity) bez warning log-a.                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    Fix: dodat 0xFFFE strip. JSON parse failure sad emituje console.warn +                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    __parserDiagnostics__.warnings entry sa "jsonFallback" stage marker.                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ #5 SLUG NORMALIZATION MISMATCH                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    parser.mjs koristio plain toLowerCase + replace; cert/manifest.mjs koristio          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    NFKD normalize + diacritic strip. Za GDD-ove sa Unicode kompatibilnim chars          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    (ДҮ/ЕЎ/Д‘/Еҫ/ДҚ ili tipografski "fi" ligature) ovo je davalo mismatched slug              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    вҶ’ cache miss izmeД‘u parser cache lookup i manifest baseline.                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    Fix: parser slug derivation sada koristi isti NFKD + diacritic strip                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    algoritam kao cert/manifest.mjs.                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ SELF-TEST (tests/tools/uq-fortify9-ninthtier.test.mjs)                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   #1 safeJSONInScript escape-uje </script>, <!--, & + round-trip preserves              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   #2 mergeIntoModel ne pollutea Object.prototype (top-level + nested + constructor)     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   #3 fileLock.mjs sadrЕҫi guard za recordedAgeMs < 0                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   #4 parser.mjs sadrЕҫi UTF-16 BOM (0xFFFE) + console.warn na JSON fallback              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   #5 parser.mjs slug derivation koristi .normalize('NFKD')                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ BASELINE REBAKE                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   UQ-16 baseline drift 3 slug zbog izmenjenog buildSlotHTML.mjs HTML output-a            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   (safeJSONInScript dodao escape characters). Rebake-ovan 338/338.                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ GATE INTEGRATION                                                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/verify.mjs step 4.97 вҖ” UQ-FORTIFY9 ninth-tier self-test                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VERIFY GATE: 32/32 zeleno (~17s)                                                         в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

## рҹҸҶ WAVE UQ-MASTERY-6 вҖ” V12 DEEPER INDUSTRY SPEC В· 2026-06-22 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"kreni redom ultimativno"* вҖ” opcija C. Produbljuje V11 sa sledeДҮim slojem
slot-industry GT-a (Layer F-K). 9 HARD + 11 SOFT rule codes. Vendor-neutralne
konstante iz public GT (regulator tehniДҚki standardi, GLI-19, MGA Class 3, UKGC RTS).

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ WAVE UQ-MASTERY-6 вҖ” V12 deeper-industry-spec walker + self-test                          в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ NOVI ALAT                                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/v12-deeper-industry-spec.mjs (~330 LOC) вҖ” 9 HARD + 11 SOFT Г— 338 GDDs            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ LAYER F В· Paytable economics                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I6.1 HP tier count u rangu [4, 8] (industry standard 4-7)                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I6.2 LP tier count u rangu [3, 10] (9/10/J/Q/K/A varijante)                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I6.3 Symbol name len u rangu [1, 80] chars                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I6.4 Top HP 5OAK > top LP 5OAK (tier monotonic) вҖ” SOFT                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I6.5 Wild ili scatter prisutan u paytable вҖ” SOFT                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ LAYER G В· Free-spin economics                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I7.1 trigger scatter count >= 3                                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I7.2 FS max award range вҖ” HARD na negativno, SOFT na 1-4 ili > 100                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I7.3 FS multiplier cap range [2, 1000]Г— вҖ” HARD na > 1000                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I7.4 FS retrigger cap <= 500 spins вҖ” SOFT                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ LAYER H В· Bonus-buy economics                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I8.1 bonusBuy.costX u rangu [30, 200]Г—                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I8.2 UKGC declared + bonusBuy enabled = HARD (UKGC ban od 2025)                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I8.3 NL-KSA bonusBuy bez disclosureRequired вҖ” SOFT                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ LAYER J В· Engine signature consistency                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I9.1 lock_respin tipiДҚno 5Г—3 вҖ” SOFT (allowed variant)                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I9.2 pay_anywhere kanonski 5Г—3 ili 6Г—5 вҖ” SOFT                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I9.3 cluster_pays kvadratan grid (|reels-rows| <= 2) вҖ” SOFT                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I9.4 variable_reel sa growable=true вҖ” SOFT                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ LAYER K В· UX presentation invariants                                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I10.1 spinTempo.totalMs u rangu [800, 6000]ms вҖ” SOFT                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I10.2 anticipation.durationMs >= 200ms вҖ” SOFT                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I10.3 bigWinTier.enabled => winPresentation.enabled вҖ” HARD                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ KORPUS REZULTAT (338 GDDs)                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   HARD: 0                                                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   SOFT: 3 (I7.2 micro-bonus variant + I9.1 lock_respin sizes)                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ SELF-TEST (tests/tools/v12-deeper-industry-spec.test.mjs)                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   9 negative fixture-a Г— HARD assertion + 1 clean positive control:                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     I6.1 12-tier HP             I6.2 1-tier LP                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     I6.3 empty symbol name      I7.1 2-scatter FS trigger                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     I7.2 negative FS award      I7.3 5000Г— multiplier cap                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     I8.1 500Г— bonus buy cost    I8.2 UKGC + bonus buy enabled                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     I10.3 bigWinTier bez winPresentation                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Clean fixture exit 0 verifikovan (no false positives).                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ GATE INTEGRATION                                                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/verify.mjs step 4.96  вҶ’ V12 walker (338 GDDs)                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/verify.mjs step 4.96b вҶ’ V12 self-test (9 HARD codes + clean)                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VERIFY GATE: 31/31 zeleno (~15s)                                                         в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

## рҹҸҶ WAVE UQ-MASTERY-5b вҖ” V9 VISUAL QA (deterministic + self-test) В· 2026-06-22 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"kreni redom ultimativno"* вҖ” opcija B (V9 VISUAL QA). Implementira
contract iz `agents/V9_VISUAL_QA.md`. Deterministic mode (no LLM, gate-suitable);
vision mode opt-in pre-release (~$0.05/game) ostaje za eksplicitan flag.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ WAVE UQ-MASTERY-5b вҖ” V9 Visual QA deterministic walker + self-test                       в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ NOVI ALAT                                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/v9-visual-qa.mjs (~260 LOC) вҖ” 8+ structural invariants per slot.html             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ DETERMINISTIC CHECKS (no browser, no LLM)                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   C1   title element present + non-empty                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   C2   mandatory hub controls (balanceHud, betSelector, spinControl, paytableBtn)        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   C3   mobile viewport meta + PWA manifest link                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   C4   CSS theme variables set (--bg + --accent)                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   C5   paytable row count matches declared symbol count (when both known)                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   C6   body length sanity (вүҘ 50 KB)                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   C7   expected engine block marker mounted (per topology.kind / is_plinko / is_slingo)  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VERDICT LADDER                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   PASS  вҖ” all checks PASS, score вүҘ 9.0/10                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   WARN  вҖ” no FAIL, score 7.0-8.9 (cosmetic drift)                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   FAIL  вҖ” any check verdict=FAIL, OR score < 7.0                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VISION MODE (--vision flag, opt-in, NE u gate-u)                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   - Hook za 10-screenshot capture via Playwright Chromium                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   - Hook za Opus 4.8 vision call (cortex-fable-ask) sa LLM prompt template iz contract-a в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   - Cost: ~$0.05/game, 5 main sweep ~$0.25, vreme 15-30s/game                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   - Stub-ovan u tools/v9-visual-qa.mjs:visionMode() (NOT implemented za sada вҖ” flag      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     reservacija samo)                                                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ KORPUS REZULTAT (338 GDDs, deterministic mode)                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   PASS:  338                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   WARN:  0                                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   FAIL:  0                                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ SELF-TEST (tests/tools/v9-visual-qa.test.mjs)                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   5 fixture-a:                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     clean    вҶ’ verdict PASS                                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     no-balance вҶ’ balanceHud check FAIL                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     no-viewport вҶ’ viewport meta check FAIL                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     no-theme  вҶ’ CSS theme check WARN (not FAIL)                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     short    вҶ’ body length check WARN                                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Walker exit 1 (FAIL present); 2 expected FAIL slugs identified.                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ GATE INTEGRATION                                                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/verify.mjs step 4.95  вҶ’ V9 deterministic walker (338 GDDs)                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/verify.mjs step 4.95b вҶ’ V9 self-test (clean + 4 failure fixtures)                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VERIFY GATE: 29/29 zeleno (~14s)                                                         в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

## рҹҸҶ WAVE UQ-CLEAN вҖ” VENDOR PURGE U LIVE DOCS В· 2026-06-21 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"ali ne spominji nigde igt ili neku drugu firmu"*. Pre-commit grep
sweep otkrio vendor mentions u CLAUDE.md, memory mastery rule + v10/v11
tool komentarima. Sve neutralizovano.

## рҹҸҶ WAVE UQ-MASTERY-4 вҖ” V11 DEEP INDUSTRY SPEC В· 2026-06-21 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"kreni detaljno"*. Produbljuje V10 (T1-T4) sa dubljim slot-industry
GT pravilima koje znaju regulatorni standardi (UKGC RTS, MGA Class 3, DGA,
DE-WHG, FR-ANJ, NL-KSA, IT-ADM, ES-DGOJ) + math-feature consistency.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ WAVE UQ-MASTERY-4 вҖ” V11 deep-industry-spec walker + self-test                            в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ NOVI ALAT                                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/v11-deep-industry-spec.mjs вҖ” 17 HARD + 3 SOFT pravila Г— 338 GDDs В· 0 LLM cost     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ LAYER A В· Mathematics & Payback (HARD)                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I1.1  RTP ispod jurisdikcionog floor-a (UK 85, MGA 85, DGA 88, DE-WHG 90,              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         FR-ANJ 92, NL-KSA 80, IT-ADM 90, ES-DGOJ 90)                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I1.1.cap RTP > 100% (player-positive game je nemoguДҮ casino slot)                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I1.2  rtpVariants per-variant floor + buy variant вүӨ 100%                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I1.3  volatilityIdx integer u rangu [1, 10]                                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I1.4  payback.maxWinX u rangu [100, 1,000,000]                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I1.5  bonusBuy.costX coherency sa rtpVariants[buy]                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ LAYER B В· Feature Math Consistency (HARD/SOFT)                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I2.1  jackpot tier monotonicity (MINI < MINOR < MAJOR < GRAND)                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I2.2  jackpot.values.GRAND u rangu [100, 1,000,000]                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I2.3  freeSpins.multiplier.ladder monotonic non-decreasing                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I2.4  freeSpins.multiplier.start вүҘ 1                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I2.5  holdAndWin.scatterTrigger u rangu [3, 8]                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I2.6  anteBet.costMultiplier вҲҲ {1.25, 1.5, 1.75, 2.0}                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ LAYER C В· Jurisdiction-specific compliance (HARD)                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I3.1  autoplay.cap вүӨ jurisdiction max (UK 100, DE 1, FR 0, NL 50, IT 50, ES 100)       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I3.2  spinTempo.totalMs вүҘ jurisdiction min (DE 5000ms, NL 3000ms, FR 3000ms)         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I3.3  FR-ANJ requires manual-only spins (no autoplay)                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I3.4  realityCheck.intervalMs вүӨ jurisdiction max (UK 60min, DGA 30min)                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I3.5  DE-WHG requires netLossIndicator enabled                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I3.6  IT-ADM/ES-DGOJ require depositLimitsRequired=true                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ LAYER D В· Symbol & Paytable floors (SOFT)                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I4.1  top HP 5OAK pay вүҘ 50Г— bet line                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I4.2  top LP 5OAK pay вүҘ 5Г— bet line                                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I4.3  wild 5OAK pay вүҘ top HP 5OAK pay                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ LAYER E В· Engine & Lifecycle invariants (HARD)                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I5.1  tumble.enabled вҮ’ postSpin.enabled                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I5.2  holdAndWin.enabled вҮ’ respin engine.enabled                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   I5.3  anteBet.enabled вҮ’ triggerMultiplier вүҘ 1                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ SKIP-AKO-NULL вҖ” 338/338 GDDs proЕЎli sa 0 HARD na current pipeline. VeДҮina               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ field-ova je null (parser nije pokupio prose) вҖ” to nije industry violation.             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ SELF-TEST (tests/tools/v11-deep-industry-spec.test.mjs)                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   17 negative fixture-a sa namernim violations + 1 clean fixture za positive control.   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Asert: svako od 17 expected rule code-ova flag-ovano (`hardByRule[X] вүҘ 1`).            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Asert: clean fixture exit 0 (no false positives).                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Cleanup mock dist/real-games/_v11-test-* nakon zavrЕЎetka.                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ GATE INTEGRATION                                                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/verify.mjs step 4.93  вҶ’ V11 walker (338 GDDs)                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/verify.mjs step 4.93b вҶ’ V11 self-test (17 codes + clean)                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VERIFY GATE: 25/25 zeleno (~10s)                                                       в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

## рҹҸҶ WAVE UQ-MASTERY-3 вҖ” V10 INDUSTRY COMPLIANCE SPEC В· 2026-06-21 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki direktiva: *"koji test joЕЎ moЕҫeЕЎ da napiЕЎeЕЎ na osnovu agenata, koji
poznaju komplet GT i slot industriju, da znamo da ДҮe sve biti uvek po
pravilu i savrЕЎeno"*.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ WAVE UQ-MASTERY-3 вҖ” slot industry ground truth encoded as gate                         в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө

в”Ӯ   PostojeДҮa pipeline V1..V9 parsira GDD u model + verifikuje da rendered HTML matchuje в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   model. Nema gate-a koji pita: "da li je ovo ЕЎto smo proizveli VALID INDUSTRY SLOT?". в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Slot moЕҫe da proД‘e sve gate-ove (verify 22/22, LEGO 8/8, parity 0) a da bude        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   industry-neutralan nonsense (paylines=15 na 5Г—3, ways=7000 umesto 7776, plinko_rows  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   = 99, cluster_min_size = 1, declared DE jurisdiction bez germanyComplianceGate).     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ FIX                                                                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   1. NEW: tools/v10-industry-compliance-spec.mjs                                       в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ      - HARD = commit blocked (10 rules)                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      - SOFT = advisory only (7 rules)                                                  в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ         * Paylines 5Г—3: {10,20,25,30,40,50,100}                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         * Ways count: {243,576,720,1024,4096,7776,15625,117649}                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         * Cluster min size вүҘ 5; FS award вүҘ 5; BonusBuy вҲҲ [30,200]                      в”Ӯ
