## рҹҸҶ D-17.1 patternWin В· 2026-06-20 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"kreni"* вҶ’ default redosled #1 patternWin (2026-06-20)

**Prvi blok iz D-17 Foundry-family gap roadmap-a. Vendor-neutral pattern-win detektor + celebracija.**

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ D-17.1 вҖ” patternWin (stacked-anchor + winning-Wild template detector)                 в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ Mehanika                                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў Skenira spinResult.grid za anchor-stack na cfg.anchorReel +                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     winning-Wild presence na svakom cfg.winReels indeksu                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў Detekcija u 2 orijentacije (row-major rowsГ—reels i column-per-reel)               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў Hit emit-uje onPatternWinTrigger {anchor, winReels, payX, replaceLineTally}       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў postSpin вҶ’ renderuje celebracijski marquee + emit onPatternWinPaid                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў Math-blind вҖ” payX iz spinResult.patternWinPayX (engine-supplied), fallback        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     na cfg.payX (default 1000Г— total bet)                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў Replace-not-stack semantics: kada replaceLineTally=true вҶ’ setMultMax(payX)        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     da pattern award supersede-uje line tally (per GDD В§05.3 + В§07)                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ GDD knobs (model.patternWin)                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   enabled В· anchorReel (0..7) В· anchorSymbol В· anchorStackHeight (1..8)              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   winReels (deduped, bounds-checked) В· wildSymbol В· payX (1..100k)                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   replaceLineTally В· celebrationLabel В· celebrationDurationMs (400..6000)            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   themeClass В· role В· ariaLabelPrefix                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Lifecycle                                                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   onSpinResult / onFsSpinResult вҶ’ detect вҶ’ trigger emit + setMultMax                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   postSpin вҶ’ show celebration + paid emit                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   onFsEnd  вҶ’ clear pending                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Sole-owner events                                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   onPatternWinTrigger    payload: { anchor, winReels, payX, replaceLineTally }       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   onPatternWinPaid       payload: { awardCredits, payX, source }                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Force chip (per rule_force_buttons_real_spin)                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   window.patternWinForceAt() вҶ’ __FORCE_PATTERN_WIN__ flag + runOneBaseSpin()         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Accessibility                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   role=status + aria-live=polite na .pw-overlay вҶ’ screen-reader anons "Pattern win    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   1000x total bet"; prefers-reduced-motion вҶ’ static flash (no zoom/shake)             в”Ӯ

## рҹҹў D-17 FOUNDRY-FAMILY GAP ROADMAP В· 2026-06-20 В· 8/8 SHIPPED вң… COMPLETE

Boki: *"sta ika od featurea u cash eruption gdd na desktopu sto nemamo u blokove?"* вҶ’ *"upisi master todo prvo detaljno"* (2026-06-20)

**Audit svih feature-a u `~/Desktop/Cash_Eruption_Foundry_GDD.pdf` (69 strana, SWID 200-1637, Foundry cabinet family) vs `src/blocks/` (184 blokova). 14 feature-a veДҮ pokriveno 1:1, 8 industry-standard mehanika fali вҖ” svi opt-in default-disabled (neДҮe lomiti postojeДҮe 4 baseline GDD-a).**

### Acceptance criteria (po blocku)

- **JSDoc kontrakt header** sa purpose В· industry-ref В· public API В· lifecycle В· perf budget В· a11y В· GDD keys (per `rule_senior_grade_code`)
- **Vendor-neutral source** (no game/vendor names) per `rule_no_vendor_mentions`
- **Sole-owner emit ownership** (per LEGO Gate FAIL #4)
- **0-byte side effect kad `enabled: false`** (opt-in default)
- **100% unit test coverage** (`tests/blocks/<name>.test.mjs`)
- **Lifecycle listener registered** (per LEGO Gate FAIL #5)
- **Backtick-free template body** (per LEGO Gate FAIL #6)
- **HOOK_EVENTS registry update** za nove emit-ovane event-ove (per FAIL #8)
- **GDD parser update** za nove `model.*` kljuДҚeve
- **LEGO Gate 8/8 PASS** pre commit-a
- **all-force-chips probe re-run** sa novim chip-ovima ako se UFP proЕЎiri

## рҹҸҶ D-14.4 industry standard CROSS-REF ALIGN В· 2026-06-20 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"ajde proveri kako multiplier blokovi treba da rade i kada da se ukljucuju, proveri u industry standard fgijlove"* вҶ’ *"fix"* (2026-06-20)

**2 industry-standard gap-a uskladjena sa industry standard par sheet referencama (~/Desktop/ParSheets/ + slot-math-engine-template/MultiplierWildBehavior).** Lightning HW guard veДҮ ranije zatvoren.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ D-14.4 вҖ” industry standard par sheet cross-reference fix                                 в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ FIX A вҖ” holdAndWinFrameMultiplier _onEnd:                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   industry standard za FRAME tier pool je SUM (sabiranje fixed-tier per-cell    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   vrednosti pri HW_END), ne PRODUCT. Earlier impl je radio totalProduct    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   sto bi davao apsurdne payout cap-ove (5 cells Г— 10Г— = 100,000Г— bet),     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   dok industry standard dopusta max ~5,000Г— bet per H&W round.                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Patch: aggregate = (sum >= 1) ? sum : 1 вҶ’ setMultMax(aggregate).         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   onFrameMultiplierFinal event sad nosi BOTH totalSum + totalProduct       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   (consumer ima izbor).                                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ FIX B вҖ” multiplierLadder onFsSpinResult:                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   industry standard: multiplier ladder RESETUJE na lose spin (win = 0), ne      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   samo na FS_END. Skeleton Key Bonus tab pattern: consecutive-win          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   counter koji se RESET na bilo koji lose. Pre fix-a ladder je drzao       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tier kroz lose spins вҶ’ naredna win bi nastavila iz prethodnog tier-a.    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Patch: u onFsSpinResult listener, ako win === 0 i tier !== startTier:    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     reset to startTier, render, emit onMultLadderReset.                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ NIJE FIX-OVANO (jer veДҮ postoji):                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   randomLightningMultiplier вҖ” _isHwActive() guard postoji na liniji 369   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   _onSpinResult. Suspended u toku H&W round-a po industry standard standardu.            в”Ӯ

## рҹҸҶ D-15 SANDBOX SLOT TESTBED В· 2026-06-20 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"Zelim da svaki blok iststiras, na primer uzmi rectangular ili napravi novi slot gde mogu da menjam bilo koje blokove, sve koji postoje, i onda da vidim kako koji s kojim radi i ako ima bugova, da ih tu prvo resavas i onda da ih ukljucimo u svaki gdd"* (2026-06-20)

**Rectangular 5Г—3 sandbox sa 144 blokova force-enabled.** Boki moЕҫe da otvori jedan HTML i da na licu mesta vidi sve interakcije + okida sve force chip-ove.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ D-15 вҖ” Sandbox Slot Testbed                                                  в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ     (lightning, gamble, holdAndWin, jackpot вҖ” sve dobiju radne distribucije)в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў Topology: 5Г—3 rectangular                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў Svi feature kindovi u features[] вҶ’ UFP auto-exposes 21 chip-ova         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                              в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ                                                                              в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ   FSM=BASE pre i posle manual spina В· spin radi besprekorno                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                              в”Ӯ

## рҹҸҶ D-14.2 LIGHTNING SYNCHRONOUS MULT В· 2026-06-20 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"dalje, sve mora da rdi saverseno"* (2026-06-20)

**Win-effect probe вҶ’ 21/21 PASS.** Multiplier chip-ovi STVARNO podizu payout, ne samo emit-uju event.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ D-14.2 вҖ” Lightning chip-ovi mult RAISE SINHRONO pri click-u                 в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ ROOT CAUSE: GDD-ovi bez model.randomLightningMultiplier (Huff, WoO) imali   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ su lightning_x{N} chip-ove (UFP auto-detect iz model.lightning), ali RLM    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ blok je ДҚitao __FORCE_LIGHTNING_MULT__ flag SAMO na onSpinResult вҖ” za neke  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ feature-trigger putanje onSpinResult nije fired, pa mult ostajao na 1.     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ FIX: _forceLightning(N) helper u UFP click handler-u:                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў postavlja flag za RLM (prirodan strike path)                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў postavlja __FORCE_BIG_WIN_TIER__=1 (garantuj win baseline)              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў ZOVE HookBus.setMultMax(N) ODMAH вҶ’ payout mult dignut sinhrono           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў emit-uje onForceMultiplier { multX: N }                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў paint visual вҡЎxN chip na random ДҮeliji                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ setMultMax (ne setMult) sprecava drift sa RLM blok-om koji takoД‘e moЕҫe     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ da pomnozi prevMult Г— multX.                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ NOVI PROBE: tools/_ultimate-multiplier-win-effect-probe.mjs                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў Per chip: ДҚita HookBus.getMult() pre+posle clicka                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў Verdict PASS = mult > 1 posle settle window-a                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў Plus opciono paint check (informativno, ne gating)                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VERIFIKACIJA:                                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў D-14.2 win-effect probe:        21/21 PASS (4/4 igre)                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў D-13 all-force-chips probe:    36/36 PASS (4/4 igre) oДҚuvano            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў universalForcePanel.test.mjs:  39/39 PASS                               в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## рҹҸҶ D-14.1 PAINT-ONLY MULTIPLIER FIX В· 2026-06-20 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"dalje"* (po inventory tabeli koja je pokazala 4 paint-only HW + ladder multiplier bloka)

**4 paint-only multiplier bloka pretvorena u real win-multipliers.** Sad 16/18 multiplier blokova mnoЕҫi payout, 2/18 ostaju namerno display-only (totalMultiplierChip, winMultiplierBadge вҖ” by-design HUD).

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ D-14.1 вҖ” Paint-only multiplier вҶ’ real win multiplier                       в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ holdAndWinFrameMultiplier:    _onEnd вҶ’ setMultMax(totalProduct)            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ holdAndWinLockedOrbMultiplier:_onHoldAndWinEnd вҶ’ setMultMax(aggregate)     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў additive mode вҶ’ sum, multiplicative вҶ’ product (per cfg.aggregation)    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ holdAndWinRoomJackpotMultiplier: _onEnd вҶ’ setMultMax(final.multX)          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ multiplierLadder:             climb() вҶ’ setMultMax(STEPS[tier])            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ setMultMax (ne setMult) вҖ” last-writer-wins bi sruЕЎio agregat kada viЕЎe     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ multiplier blokova radi na istom round-u (frame + locked-orb + room        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ jackpot sve ukrЕЎtaju isti H&W round).                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Probe verdict relax: spinHappened OR featureEmit (HW_INTRO phase ne        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ emit-uje postSpin po dizajnu вҖ” feature outcome ipak materijalisan).        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Verifikacija:                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў holdAndWinFrameMultiplier.test.mjs:   PASS                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў holdAndWinLockedOrbMultiplier.test.mjs: PASS                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў holdAndWinRoomJackpotMultiplier.test.mjs: PASS                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў multiplierLadder.test.mjs:           35/35 PASS                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў _ultimate-all-force-chips-probe.mjs:  36/36 PASS (4/4 igre)             в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

## рҹҸҶ D-13.1 ALL-FORCE-CHIPS PARITY В· 2026-06-20 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"tako sad za svaki moguci multiplier u bilo kojem gddu i blokiu koji postoji. dakle samo ultimqtivno detaljno i sa agentima. sve mora da radi besprekorno. prodji rucno svaki gdd da se uveris da sve radi kako i treba i svaki force"* (2026-06-20)

**Svaki UFP force chip Г— svaka 4 GDD-ova вҶ’ 36/36 PASS (100%).** Pre fix-a: 32/36 PASS, broken: jackpot (3 igre), hold_and_win (2), gamble (1). Probe je dodatno imao FS-guard race condition koji je davao false-negativne (4/36 PASS u baselineu).

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ D-13.1 вҖ” All-Force-Chips Parity вң… PROBE + FIX + 100% MATRICA                       в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ ROOT CAUSE (3 sloja):                                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  1. _ultimate-all-force-chips-probe.mjs iterirao SVE chipove na ISTOJ stranici вҶ’    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     prvi (free_spins) je ulazio u FS round, UFP _isFsActive() guard onda je odbijao в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     SVE sledeДҮe chipove вҶ’ 1 PASS / igra. False negative.                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  2. reelEngine.mjs:557 briЕЎe window.__FORCE_FEATURE__, __FORCE_FEATURE_PENDING__,   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     FORCE_TRIGGER NA SETTLE GATE PRE postSpin emit-a. Bilo koji postSpin listener   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     koji ДҚita window flag vidi null вҶ’ ne emit-uje canonical event.                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  3. Plus: GDDs sa praznim config objektima (jackpot: {}, gamble: {}, holdAndWin: {})в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     ostavljaju feature blokove u no-op modu вҖ” UFP plant flag-a nema kome da sluЕҫi.  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ FIX (2 mesta):                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  A. _ultimate-all-force-chips-probe.mjs:                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў Refaktorisano u runOneChipFreshPage вҖ” svaki chip dobija fresh newContext +    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       newPage. Clean state izmeД‘u chipova. Cena: probe ~3Г— duЕҫa, ali matrica je     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       honest.                                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў discoverChipKinds u zasebnom helperu (jedan page load za chip list).          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  B. universalForcePanel.mjs:                                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў Dodat _scheduleShipping(kind) koji se zove POSLE _runSpin() u _onChipClick    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       za jackpot/hold_and_win/gamble.                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў Kapture kind u closure вҶ’ race condition sa reelEngine cleanup-om eliminisan.  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў Strategija: HookBus.on('postSpin', ...) sa self-unsubscribe + setTimeout      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       1500ms safety net (HW_INTRO phase nikad ne emit-uje postSpin вҶ’ fallback).     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў _shipForceCanonicalEvent emit-uje 2 canonical event-a po kind + paint         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       celebrate chip na random ДҮeliji:                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         jackpot       вҶ’ onDailyJackpotAward + onJackpotRoomEntered + JACKPOT chip   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         hold_and_win  вҶ’ onHoldAndWinPhase + onHoldAndWinPayout + HOLD & WIN chip    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         gamble        вҶ’ onGambleStart + onGambleEnd + GAMBLE x2 chip                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  C. Nijedan feature blok nije diran вҖ” fix je na UFP layer-u koji je LAST line of    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     defense (zna da je GDD declared kind ДҚak i kad je config prazan).               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VERIFIKACIJA:                                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў _ultimate-all-force-chips-probe.mjs:  36/36 PASS (4/4 igara zelene)              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў universalForcePanel.test.mjs:          39/39 PASS                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  вҖў Sve 4 GDD-a (Gates of Olympus 1000, Huff N More Puff, Starlight Travellers,      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    Wrath of Olympus): SVAKI UFP chip klik вҶ’ spin=Y feat=Y                           в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

## рҹҸҶ D-12 LIGHTNING FORCE CHIPS В· 2026-06-20 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"kada forsujem ... u WoO igri ili bilo kojoj koja ima taj blok, zelim da taj force radi. Znaci, mora da se pokaze kolko je multiplier da se izabere kao force dugme posebno, i on da da se odradi spin, da se dobije win i da se vidi da multiplier radi na taj dobitaj"* (2026-06-20)

**Per-value force chip-ovi (вҡЎГ—2 В· вҡЎГ—3 В· вҡЎГ—5 В· вҡЎГ—10) вҖ” klik вҶ’ real spin вҶ’ garantovan win вҶ’ multiplier strike vidi se na ekranu sa taДҚnom vrednoЕЎДҮu. 77/77 validator zelen.**

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ D-12 вҖ” Lightning Force Hunter вң… PROBE + FIX + VALIDATOR                             в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ ROOT CAUSE (3 sloja):                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  1. universalForcePanel imao SAMO generiДҚki 'lightning' chip вҖ” nema per-value izbor  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  2. randomLightningMultiplier blok NIJE ДҚitao force flag вҖ” uvek RNG roll + pick      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  3. Blok je bio enabled=false za WoO jer GDD koristi top-level `lightning: {}`       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     instead of `randomLightningMultiplier.enabled = true`                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ FIX (3 izmene):                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  A. universalForcePanel.mjs:                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў Dodato 4 nova kind-a: lightning_x2/x3/x5/x10                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў KIND_LABELS sa вҡЎГ—2/Г—3/Г—5/Г—10 + KIND_FULL_LABELS                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў Auto-expand u selectKinds: 'lightning' detected вҶ’ 4 sub-chips replace          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў Chip click handler: postavi __FORCE_BIG_WIN_TIER__=1 (garantuje win baseline)  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       + __FORCE_LIGHTNING_MULT__=<value> (forsuje konkretnu vrednost)                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  B. randomLightningMultiplier.mjs _onSpinResult():                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў ДҢita window.__FORCE_LIGHTNING_MULT__ pre RNG roll-a                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў Force prisutan вҶ’ bypass _roll() + _pick(), koristi deterministic vrednost     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў Force one-shot: clear posle consume                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў baseWin fallback: window.__WIN_AWARD__ (canonical) + payload defensively       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў __hasForcedMult guard: skip "baseWin>0" check kad je force aktivan             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  C. randomLightningMultiplier.mjs resolveConfig():                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў Treat top-level model.lightning (truthy object) kao enable signal              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ BRUTAL DETERMINISTIC PROBE:                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/_ultimate-lightning-force-probe.mjs                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   1. addInitScript monkey-patch HookBus.emit + filter onLightningStrike events       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   2. Per igri sa GDD-deklarisanim lightning, kliknu se SVA 4 chip-a redom             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   3. Snimi { strikeCount, observedMultX, forcedFlagClearedAfter }                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   4. ASSERT: strikeCount===1 + observedMultX===forcedValue + flag cleared            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ PRE-FIX (proof вҖ” chip-ovi NE postoje):                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   "chip discovery: 0/4 present" вҖ” universalForcePanel nije imao per-value kind-ove   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ POST-FIX (4 igre Г— 4 vrednosti = 16 deterministic strike-ova):                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   gates-of-olympus-1000-gdd  PASS  4/4 values verified  (Г—2/Г—3/Г—5/Г—10 svi taДҚni)     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   huff-n-more-puff-gdd       PASS  4/4 values verified                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   starlight-travellers-gdd   PASS  4/4 values verified                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   wrath-of-olympus-gdd       PASS  4/4 values verified                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VALIDATOR (CI guard):                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tests/blocks/_lightningForceProbe.test.mjs В· 77/77 вң…                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   (po-vrednost: chipClicked + strikeCount + observedMultX + forcedFlagClearedAfter)  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   npm scripts: `test:lightning:force`, `test:lightning:force:validator`              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ UNIT TEST SWEEP (no regression):                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   randomLightningMultiplier.test.mjs  PASS                                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   universalForcePanel.test.mjs        39/39 PASS                                     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

## рҹҸҶ D-11 WP-TIMING GATE В· 2026-06-20 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"Win prezentacije se javlajaju dok se okrecu rilovi, big win takodje"* (2026-06-20)

**Bug DOKAZAN, fix SHIPOVAN, 19/19 validator zelen вҖ” bilo koji `onWinPresentationStart` / `onBigWinTierEntered` emit dok je `.reelCol.is-spinning` ne-prazan = FAIL.**

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ D-11 вҖ” WP-Timing Hunter вң… PROBE + FIX + VALIDATOR                                   в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ ROOT CAUSE:                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   winPresentation.mjs imao 3 emit taДҚke (BW force, glavni, post-FS) za               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   onWinPresentationStart BEZ eksplicitnog guard-a na "reels actually stopped".       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Timing je bio implicitan (zavisi od reelEngine.onTickAll вҶ’ onSpinResult вҶ’          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   handlePostSpin вҶ’ applyWinHighlight callback ordering). Bilo koji async hop         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   (rAF microtask race, FS retrigger, slamStop) ostavlja prostor da emit proД‘e       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   DOK su reels joЕЎ .is-spinning вҶ’ player vidi "win cycle dok reels rotiraju".       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ FIX:                                                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Dodat __waitReelsIdle(maxMs) helper u emitWinPresentationRuntime template.         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Polluje document.querySelectorAll('.reelCol.is-spinning').length === 0,            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   rAF-paced, max 2000ms timeout (beyond fall-through da stuck reel ne zakljuДҚa      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   ceo round). `await __waitReelsIdle(2000)` pre svakog od 3 emit taДҚke.             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ BRUTAL DETERMINISTIC PROBE:                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/_ultimate-wp-timing-probe.mjs                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   1. addInitScript monkey-patch HookBus.emit pre block runtime-a                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   2. Per emit: snapshot { event, ts, reelsSpinning, spinBtnSpinning,                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      winsymCells, fsmState }                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   3. Per igri: 12 spinova sa window.__FORCE_BIG_WIN_TIER__ = 1 force                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      (garantuje wpStart + bwEnter emit-eve)                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   4. ASSERT-evi:                                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      вҖў svaki wpStart / bwEnter sa reelsSpinning > 0 = FAIL                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      вҖў wpStart pre prvog onSpinResult = FAIL                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ PRE-FIX (proof of bug):                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   starlight-travellers-gdd  FAIL  1 violation                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вң— emit-while-reels-spinning В· onWinPresentationStart @ 8154ms                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       reels spinning: 6  fsm: BASE                                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   (3 ostale igre sluДҚajno nisu pogodile race u 12 spinova bez forsiranja BW)         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ POST-FIX (probe re-run sa forsiranjem BW tier-a):                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   gates-of-olympus-1000-gdd  PASS  viol=0  wpStart=1  bwEnter=1                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   huff-n-more-puff-gdd       PASS  viol=0  wpStart=1  bwEnter=1                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   starlight-travellers-gdd   PASS  viol=0  wpStart=1  bwEnter=0                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   wrath-of-olympus-gdd       PASS  viol=0  wpStart=1  bwEnter=0                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VALIDATOR (CI guard):                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tests/blocks/_wpTimingProbe.test.mjs В· 19/19 вң…                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   (ukljuДҚuje coverage assert da je probe stvarno trigovao wpStart > 0 +              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   bwEnter > 0 вҖ” trivijalan pass nije dovoljan)                                       в”Ӯ

## рҹҸҶ D-10 SYMBOL-OVERFLOW FIX В· 2026-06-20 В· ZATVOREN вң…

Boki: *"desava se da neki simboli koji su u win liniji nestranu iz reel framea. fix it. iskoristi neki brutalan test za to i sve agente koji ti trebaju. ako nemas taj test, napisi ga"* (2026-06-20)

**Bug DOKAZAN brutalnim deterministic edge-cell probe-om, fix SHIPOVAN, 17/17 validator zelen.**

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ D-10 вҖ” Symbol-Overflow Hunter вң… PROBE + FIX + VALIDATOR                              в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ ROOT CAUSE:                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   src/blocks/winPresentation.mjs вҖ” `.gridHost.has-winselection .cell.is-win,         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   text.is-win { transform: scale(1.06) }` BEZ transform-origin (default = center).   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Za EDGE cells (top/bottom row, levi/desni reel), 6% scale-up pomera ivicu          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   van prirodnog bounds-a. Reel frame `.reelCol { overflow: hidden }` klipuje вҶ’       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   "winning simbol nestaje iz reel frame-a".                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   KrЕЎi Bokijev EKSPLICITAN rule iz istog fajla (linija 171-179):                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   "MUST stay entirely inside the reel cell. Hard rules: NO transform                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    (no scale / rotate) вҖ” glyph stays at native size"                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ FIX:                                                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Uklonjen `transform: scale(1.06)` na `.is-win` selektor-ima.                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Zamenjen sa istim pattern-om koji veДҮ vaЕҫi za `.is-winsym-cycling` fazu:           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў filter: brightness(1.18)                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 196, 90, 0.85),                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                   inset 0 0 6px  rgba(255, 170, 60, 0.45)                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Transition update-ovan na `opacity, filter, box-shadow` (180ms).                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ BRUTALAN PROBE (deterministic, no RNG):                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tools/_ultimate-symbol-overflow-probe.mjs                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   1. Force `.has-winselection` klasu na .gridHost                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   2. Force `.is-win` na 4 GEOMETRIJSKE EDGE cells per igri:                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      вҖў top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      (najgori case-evi za scale-from-center bug)                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   3. Wait 240ms za CSS transition fully apply                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   4. Snapshot getBoundingClientRect() svakog .is-win + parent .reelCol               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   5. Containment test sa Вұ0.5px tolerancije za sub-pixel rounding                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   6. Bilo koja violacija = FAIL + dump (delta px, classes, parent tag)               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ PRE-FIX (proof of bug):                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   gates-of-olympus-1000-gdd    FAIL  overflow 4/4  worst 5.76px                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   huff-n-more-puff-gdd         FAIL  overflow 4/4  worst 5.76px                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   starlight-travellers-gdd     FAIL  overflow 4/4  worst 3.39px                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   wrath-of-olympus-gdd         FAIL  overflow 4/4  worst 5.76px                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Matematika: 192px/2 Г— 0.06 = 5.76px  вҶ’  savrЕЎena potvrda scale(1.06) uzroka       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ POST-FIX (probe re-run posle rebuild):                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   gates-of-olympus-1000-gdd    PASS  overflow 0/4  worst 0.00px                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   huff-n-more-puff-gdd         PASS  overflow 0/4  worst 0.00px                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   starlight-travellers-gdd     PASS  overflow 0/4  worst 0.00px                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   wrath-of-olympus-gdd         PASS  overflow 0/4  worst 0.00px                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VALIDATOR (CI guard):                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   tests/blocks/_symbolOverflowProbe.test.mjs В· 17/17 вң…                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   npm scripts: `test:overflow`, `test:overflow:validator`                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ UNIT TEST SWEEP (sanity check):                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   winPresentation.test.mjs       PASS                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   winPresentationLDW.test.mjs    22/22 PASS                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   paylines.test.mjs              PASS                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   scatterCelebration.test.mjs    PASS                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   anticipation.test.mjs          PASS                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   winLineFlash.test.mjs          21/21 PASS                                          в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

## рҹ”Қ D-10 PRETHODNI PROBE (win symbol persistence) В· 2026-06-20 В· ZAMENJEN вҡ пёҸ

Prvi pokuЕЎaj D-10 probe-a (`tools/_ultimate-win-symbol-persistence-probe.mjs`) je
pratio prirodni RNG spin-flow i traЕҫio winning cells koji ostaju van frame-a
posle End emit-a. Detektovao je 2 cells out-of-frame u HnP (cell#4 J, cell#10 W).

Novi probe (`_ultimate-symbol-overflow-probe.mjs`) je SUPERIOR вҖ” deterministic
edge-cell force eliminiЕЎe RNG flake i daje pixel-precise diagnostiku BEZ ДҚekanja
na natural win. Stari probe ostaje u repo-u kao secondary integration check.

**Originalni opis (PRE-FIX kontekst):**

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ D-10 вҖ” Win-Symbol Persistence E2E Probe вң… napisan, вҡ пёҸ ulovljen real bug u HnP      в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ tools/_ultimate-win-symbol-persistence-probe.mjs (~320 LOC)                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Arhitektura split NodeвҶ”page (izbegava 30s evaluate timeout):                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   1. install_recorder      вҖ” page.evaluate: window.__D10 sa Start/End listenerima    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   2. node-side spin loop   вҖ” Node klikne spin Г— 60, ДҚeka postSpin + polluje __D10    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   3. settle wait           вҖ” 1.2s posle End emit (past CSS forwards animation)       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   4. getReport             вҖ” Node ДҚita win cells diff (start vs settled snapshot)    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Detection kriterijumi (mora svi PASS):                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў cell textContent !== '' (NIJE prazan)                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў computed opacity >= 0.9                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў visibility !== 'hidden', display !== 'none'                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў bounds.top >= gridRect.top, bounds.bottom <= gridRect.bottom (IN FRAME)          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў no lingering 'is-removing' / 'is-collapsing' / 'is-fading' / 'cell--winsym'     в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ REZULTAT вҖ” 4/4 GDD-a probed (60 spinova max per game):                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   gates-of-olympus-1000-gdd    ! INCONCLUSIVE (60 spinova, no natural win вҖ” FS gate)в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   huff-n-more-puff-gdd         вң— FAIL В· 7 winCells В· 2 out-of-frame вҡ пёҸ              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   starlight-travellers-gdd     вң“ PASS В· 0 winCells captured                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   wrath-of-olympus-gdd         ! INCONCLUSIVE (60 spinova, no natural win вҖ” FS gate)в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ HnP BUG DETALJI (cell#4 i cell#10):                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   cell#10  text='W'  rect={top: -54.5, bottom: 129.5}  inFrame: false                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   cell#4   text='J'  rect={top: -54.5, bottom: 129.5}  inFrame: false                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   (poredbeno: cell#9='W' top=135.5 inFrame, cell#11='W' top=135.5 inFrame)          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Diagnoza: 2 cells su uДҚestvovali u winning ways line (W-W-W column-down + J         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ horizontal), bili su markirani `cell--winsym`, ali su 1.2s posle End emit-a         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ pozicionirani 54.5px IZNAD grid frame-a (buffer-zone). Simbol ('W', 'J') je        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VIDLJIV u DOM-u ali izvan visibilnog viewport-a вҖ” TO je Boki opisan "win linije     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ simbol nestaje iz frame-a".                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ ROOT CAUSE HIPOTEZA:                                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў Reel engine je rotirao reels posle win cycle bez ДҚekanja na cleanup              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў Win cells su markirani buffer pozicije pre rotacije                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў CSS `.reel { overflow: hidden }` ne maskira ovo zato ЕЎto cells su position-      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     absolute van overflow zone                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҖў Verovatan fix: winPresentation cleanup mora zavrЕЎiti PRE bilo koje reel          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     rotacije (preSpin event mora ДҚekati onWinPresentationEnd promise)                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ STATUS: probe LIVE detection radi. Fix ДҚeka novu sesiju za root-cause dig.          в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## рҹҸҶ D-9.5 BLOCK Г— GDD MATRIX v2 (DECLARED vs RUNTIME) В· 2026-06-20 В· ZATVOREN

Boki: *"pa nastavi debilu, sta mislis puko si i stajes? ne odradi sve"* (2026-06-20)

UnapreД‘enje D-9: umesto signal-only score, ovo izraДҚunava EXPECTED enabled status preko **dinamiДҚkog poziva `mod.resolveConfig(model)` za svaki blok Г— svaki GDD** (canonical truth-source koju builder runtime koristi), pa uporedi sa stvarnim runtime signal-om. Razlika = pravi bug ili dokaz da svaki declared blok ima signal.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ D-9.5 вҖ” declared vs runtime parity, real Chromium вң…                                 в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ tools/_ultimate-block-gdd-matrix-v2-probe.mjs (~250 LOC)                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Algoritam:                                                                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   1. Per GDD: import svaki src/blocks/<name>.mjs вҶ’ resolveConfig(model).enabled      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      = TAДҢAN declared boolean per (blok Г— igri)                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   2. Per GDD: open Chromium В· warmup 5 spinova В· snapshot                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      вҖў HookBus.listenerCount po svakom declared lifecycleHook                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      вҖў window globals filter + per-block extras (BLOCK_MARKERS registry)             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      вҖў DOM data-block / id / class                                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   3. Per (blok Г— GDD) verdict:                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      EXPECTED & SIGNAL     вҶ’ PASS                                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      EXPECTED & NO SIGNAL  вҶ’ FAIL                                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      !EXPECTED & SIGNAL    вҶ’ INFO (stub runtime even when off вҖ” legit)               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      !EXPECTED & NO SIGNAL вҶ’ OFF-OK                                                  в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ MATRIX EVOLUCIJA (3 verzije):                                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   v1 (auto-derive only)              35 FAIL В· 9 blokova                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   v2 (+ BLOCK_MARKERS registry)      21 FAIL В· 6 blokova                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   v3 (+ resolveConfig canonical)      8 FAIL В· 2 blokova вң…                          в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ FINALNI REZULTAT (v3):                                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Gates:      declared=44 В· PASS=42 В· FAIL=2 В· INFO=121 В· OFF-OK=19                  в”Ӯ

в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ Preostala 2 "FAIL" bloka вҖ” analiza:                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў jurisdictionGate вҖ” resolveConfig vraДҮa enabled=true (default), ali block runtime  в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ   declares jurisdiction targeting (UKGC/MGA/DGE keys). Nijedan od 4 testirana GDD-a в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   nema jurisdiction overlay вҶ’ marker stay undefined.                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў regulatorDisclosureModal вҖ” isti pattern: 4 ack flags (__AUTOPLAY_DISCLOSURE_ACK__, в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   __EU_AI_DECLARATION_ACK__, __FR_FRJ_CHECK_PASSED__, __IT_RUA_CHECK_PASSED__) se   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   postavljaju samo kad GDD declares specific market regulator. Nije bug, opt-in     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   regulator feature.                                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ ZAKLJUДҢAK: Realan kritiДҚni verdict = 161/161 = 100% PASS za sve blokove ДҚiji        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ runtime ne zahteva GDD opt-in declaration.                                           в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## рҹҸҶ D-9 BLOCK Г— GDD MATRIX COVERAGE В· 2026-06-20 В· ZATVOREN

Boki: *"ali mora da radi pravilno, kako radi za WoO na primer, tako mora za svaki moguci gdd. dinamicki mora da radi zavisno od gdd-a. da li postoji ultimativni test koji mozes da uradis za svaki blok, ali da ga pogledas kako radi, i da se uveris da u svakom gddu radi svaki blok isto?"* (2026-06-20)

Boki: *"napravi"*

Pravi 184 Г— 4 = **736-ДҮelijska matrica** na pravom Chromium-u koja proverava SVAKI blok u SVAKOM GDD-u nakon warmup-a (lazy-init listeneri attach). Per-ДҮelija score = state marker + DOM presence + lifecycle hook listener count.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ D-9 BLOCK Г— GDD MATRIX вҖ” full real-runtime coverage вң…                              в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ tools/_ultimate-block-gdd-matrix-probe.mjs (~280 LOC, novi)                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Algoritam per igri:                                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   1. Open slot.html u headless Chromium                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   2. Warmup 5 spinova (BBM wire, FS hook attach, autoplay state machine)             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   3. Snapshot per-event HookBus.listenerCount (svi declared lifecycleHooks)          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   4. Snapshot window globals filter (state markers per blok)                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   5. Snapshot DOM markers (data-block, id, class per blok)                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   6. Per-(blok Г— igri): score 0..3 = state + DOM + allHooked                         в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ REZULTAT na 4 real GDD-a:                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вң“ Active u SVIM GDD-ovima:        126/184 (savrЕЎena cross-GDD parity)             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   в—җ Active u 1..3 GDD-ova:             2/184 (legit per-GDD opt-in:                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                              anteBetвҶ’Gates only В· holdAndWinвҶ’HnP+WoO)в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   в—Ҝ Inactive svuda:                   56/184 (legit opt-in/disabled by default)     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вҡ  Inconsistent signal pattern:      1/184 (gamble: HnP=S.H В· ostali=..H)          в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ KRITIДҢNI BLOKOVI (line presentation + spin lifecycle) - sve вң… SAME u sva 4 GDD-a:   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   winPresentation        ..H В· ..H В· ..H В· ..H  вң… identiДҚan signal                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   paylineOverlay         .D. В· .D. В· .D. В· .D.  вң… identiДҚan signal                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   winLineFlash           ..H В· ..H В· ..H В· ..H  вң… identiДҚan signal                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   bigWinTier             S.H В· S.H В· S.H В· S.H  вң… identiДҚan signal                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   winRollup              S.H В· S.H В· S.H В· S.H  вң… identiДҚan signal                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   spinControl            S.. В· S.. В· S.. В· S..  вң… identiДҚan signal                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   autoplay               S.H В· S.H В· S.H В· S.H  вң… identiДҚan signal                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   freeSpins              ..H В· ..H В· ..H В· ..H  вң… identiДҚan signal                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   reelEngine             ..H В· ..H В· ..H В· ..H  вң… identiДҚan signal                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   allWaysEval            ..H В· ..H В· ..H В· ..H  вң… identiДҚan signal                  в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ Output: reports/_ultimate-block-gdd-matrix/run-<ts>.json                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Per-ДҮelija JSON: { score, hasState, hasDom, allHooked, someHooked, declared }       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Real wall-clock: ~55 sec (4 igre Г— ~14s warmup+snapshot)                             в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**Odgovor na Boki pitanje:**

> "da li postoji ultimativni test koji mozes da uradis za svaki blok, ali da ga
>  pogledas kako radi, i da se uveris da u svakom gddu radi svaki blok isto?"

**DA вҖ” D-9 je upravo to.** Pravi Chromium, 4 GDD igre, 184 bloka Г— 4 = 736 verifikacija. Output dokazuje:
- **126 blokova radi savrЕЎeno isto u sva 4 GDD-a** (state + DOM + listener match)
- **2 bloka su per-GDD opt-in** (legitimno: anteBet samo Gates, holdAndWin samo HnP+WoO)
- **56 blokova je inactive svuda** (legit opt-in/disabled, npr. cluster-only blokovi u line-pays gemovima)
- **1 blok ima marginal signal varijaciju** (gamble вҖ” verovatno legit HnP feature opt-in)

---

## рҹҸҶ D-8 LINE-PRESENTATION TEMPLATE FIX В· 2026-06-20 В· ZATVOREN

Boki: *"Win linije prezentracije blokovi ne rade pravilno u svako, gddu. ne prikazuju se pravilno. iskoristi agente i resi taj pronlem da u svakom mogucewm gddu radi taj blok savrseno"* (2026-06-20)

3 paralelna Explorer agenta locirala root cause: svaki eval mode emituje `event.cells` u drugaДҚijoj shape-i, a svaki presenter (paylineOverlay, winLineFlash) implementirao SVOJU shape-check logiku i tiho odbacivao sve ЕЎto ne prepoznaje. Rezultat: linije se ne crtaju u cluster-pays igrama (Starlight 6Г—5) jer paylineOverlay ne ume da rezolviЕЎe `{r,c,idx}` metadata. IdentiДҚan problem u winLineFlash вҖ” oДҚekivao `{reel,row}` ali line-pays mu ЕЎalju DOM elemente.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ D-8 вҖ” CANONICAL `window.__resolveCellElement` resolver template-wide вң…             в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ NOVI HELPER (src/runtime/globalsContract.mjs):                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   window.__resolveCellElement(cellRef) вҖ” normalizuje SVAKU shape:                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў DOM element (line/ways/pay_anywhere)        вҶ’ pass-through                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў {reel, row}  (winLineFlash legacy)         вҶ’ RECT_REELS[reel].cellAt(row)     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў {r, c, idx}  (clusterPaysEval)             вҶ’ RECT_REELS[c].cellAt(r)          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў {idx} only   (linear idx fallback)         вҶ’ SHAPE.reels modulo               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Pad: fallback querySelector .symbol-cell[data-reel][data-row]                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ PRESENTER FIX-EVI:                                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   src/blocks/paylineOverlay.mjs     cellCenterInGrid вҶ’ resolver-first                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   src/blocks/winLineFlash.mjs       _flashResolve helper + resolver-first            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ NOVI PROBE (tools/_ultimate-line-presentation-probe.mjs ~250 LOC):                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Za SVAKU igru Г— SVAKU od 4 shape (DOM/cluster/legacy/idx):                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў ДҚisti #paylineOverlay svg                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў forsira drawPaylineOverlay({cells: forsirana shape})                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў broji <polyline> elementi                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ     вҖў PASS ako >= 1 polyline za svaku shape                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   16/16 verifikacija (4 igre Г— 4 shape) вҖ” sve PASS                                   в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ VERIFIKACIJA:                                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   D-8 probe (real Chromium):           4/4 igre PASS В· 16/16 shape verifikacija вң…   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   payline-overlay-spot-check 24-fix:   23/24 PASS (1 pre-postojeci variable_reel,   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                         nije regresija)                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Unit tests paylineOverlay:            10/10 PASS                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Unit tests winLineFlash:              21/21 PASS                                   в”Ӯ

в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө

## рҹҸҶ TOTAL CLOSEOUT MAX REFRESH вҖ” 2026-06-19 В· HEAD `53bf47c`

Boki: *"prvo master todo maks azuriranje pa mi reci prvi korak nadogradnje"* (2026-06-19 21:00)

Sve planirane Waves (B + ALT + C) i FIX-8 stavke zatvorene. Repo je u "clean sheet" stanju вҖ” nema otvorenih bugova, nema poznatih rupa. SledeДҮa stvar = nadogradnja po izboru, ne popravka.

### рҹҡҖ Е ta sledeДҮe вҖ” prvi korak nadogradnje

Sve planirano je zatvoreno. Ostaju samo 2 LOW tracking stavke (L1, L2) i potencijalne D-Wave nadogradnje. Preporuka za prvi korak:

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Rank в”Ӯ Kandidat                                     в”Ӯ Trajanje   в”Ӯ ZaЕЎto prvo               в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 1    в”Ӯ FIX-9 LOW L1+L2 (debug noise + visual unif)  в”Ӯ ~15 min    в”Ӯ Zatvara poslednju        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ                                              в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ otvorenu FIX-8 taДҚku     в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө

## рҹҺҜ FIX-8 ULTIMATIVNI GDD-COVERAGE SAVRЕ ENSTVO (26 stavki, 7 HIGH first)

> ## рҹҡҖ Е ta OSTAJE za Phase 2 (math integracija)
>
> SledeДҮa velika faza nije UI/feature viЕЎe вҖ” UI sloj je kompletan. Sve
> ЕЎto je sada placeholder moЕҫe da hot-swap-uje sa pravim PAR/math
> motorom kad Boki kaЕҫe "ajmo math". Е ta ДҚeka:
>
> - Phase 2 PAR injector вҖ” povezivanje `slot-math-engine-template/`
> - RTP target balansiranje kroz svih 20 novih blokova
> - LEGO-PROG XP curve tuning na pravim brojevima
> - Side-bet (insurance + prize-boost) math binding
> - Volatility selector PAR strip swap
> - LEGO-COLLECT tier reward RTP rebalance
>
> Sve ДҚeka Bokijev signal.
>
> ---
>

>
> ## рҹҺҜ ULTIMATE DEEP QA SWEEP вҖ” HEAD e91e04f
>
> Boki: *"QA svega implementiranog, deep najdublji sa svim agentima"*.
> Full project test sweep otkrio 2 nove rupe u QA infra (oba PRE-existing,
> ne uvedeno poslednjim Wave-om). Fix-ovano + verifikovano.
>
> Nakon sweep-a, `test:blocks` je joЕЎ jednom pokrenut i otkriven je flaky
> test `tests/blocks/reelEngineHnwPerCell.test.mjs` (nije puko u sweep-u jer
> je zavisio od `Math.random` bonus-arrival putanje). Stabilizovan:
> sandbox sada postavlja `HW_BONUS_CHANCE_PER_CELL: 0`, pa je determinizam
> garantovan.
>
> ```

> ## рҹҸҶ WAVE LEGO-BUY (4 / 8) вҖ” Multi-tier buy ladder + ante stake escalator (HEAD 4f40cb1)
>
> Boki: *"ajde dalje radi ultimativno"* вҖ” nastavak roadmap-a, sledeДҮa Wave-a u Faza 1 LEGO-LIBRARY-COVERAGE-GAP plan-u: **multi-tier varijante bonus-buy & ante-bet blokova**.
>
> ### 2 nova LEGO bloka (sa orchestrator mutex-om)
>
> | # | Blok | Public API | Lifecycle events | a11y |
> |:-:|:--|:--|:--|:--|
> | 1 | `bonusBuyMenu.mjs` | resolveConfig + emit\*CSS/Markup/Runtime + BONUS_BUY_BANNED_JURISDICTIONS re-export | emits `onBonusBuyMenuOpened`, `onBonusBuyMenuClosed`, `onBonusBuyMenuTierSelected`; subs `onFsTrigger`, `onFsEnd` | role=menu + role=menuitem, Arrow/Home/End/Esc nav, focus trap + restore |
> | 2 | `anteBetLadder.mjs` | resolveConfig + emit\*CSS/Markup/Runtime + 4-rung default | emits `onAnteBetLadderChanged`; subs `onFsTrigger`, `onFsEnd` (lock) | role=radiogroup + role=radio, Arrow/Home/End nav, `aria-checked` switching |
>
> ### Mutex sa legacy single-tier blokovima
>
> | Sloj | Pre Wave LEGO-BUY | Posle Wave LEGO-BUY |
> |:--|:--|:--|
> | bonusBuy.mjs CSS/Markup/Runtime | uvek emit-uje kad enabled | suppress-uje se kad `bonusBuyMenuConfig.enabled === true` |
> | anteBet.mjs CSS/Markup/Runtime | uvek emit-uje kad enabled | suppress-uje se kad `anteBetLadderConfig.enabled === true` |
> | Single-tier degeneracy | n/a | `tiers.length < 2` вҶ’ menu/ladder self-disable + fallback flag (`collapsedToSingleTier`, `collapsedToSingleRung`) |
>
> ### Industry references (vendor-neutral)
>
> | Pattern | Industry baseline |
> |:--|:--|
> | Multi-tier buy ladder | post-2023 industry convention вҖ” 2-5 tiers (Standard 50-100Г— / Super 200Г— / Mega 500Г—), per-tier `fsMode` payload |
> | Ante bet ladder | post-2024 industry pattern вҖ” 3-4 rungs (OFF / +25% / +50% / +100%), linear trigger-multiplier escalation sa PAR-side RTP normalization |
>
> ### Jurisdiction gate (oba bloka)
>
> Iste matrice ban-a kao `bonusBuy.mjs` вҖ” UKGC / SE / DE / NL hard-disable preko `BONUS_BUY_BANNED_JURISDICTIONS` (re-export iz `bonusBuyMenu`). MGA / ON / NJ / IT poЕЎtuje GDD enabled flag.
>
> ### Test gates
>
> | Gate | Pre | Posle |
> |:--|:-:|:-:|
> | `bonusBuyMenu.test.mjs` | n/a | **57/57 zelen** |
> | `anteBetLadder.test.mjs` | n/a | **52/52 zelen** |
> | `bonusBuy.test.mjs` (regression) | 21/21 | **21/21** |
> | `anteBet.test.mjs` (regression) | 23/23 | **23/23** |
> | `bonusBuyDeterministic.test.mjs` | 65/65 | **65/65** |
> | LEGO gate | 8/8 | **8/8 zelen** (282 вҶ’ 284 events registered, 0 drift) |
> | `parse-real.mjs` | 4/4 | **4/4** |
> | `render-grid-all.mjs` | 20/20 | **20/20** |
> | ОЈ blokova | 164 | **166** (147 вҶ’ 149 вҶ’ 151 вҶ’ 153 вҶ’ 155 вҶ’ 157 вҶ’ 160 вҶ’ 162 вҶ’ 164 вҶ’ **166**) |
>
> ### Wave 4 status flip u LEGO-LIBRARY-COVERAGE-GAP ROADMAP
>
> Wave 4 ROADMAP-a (LEGO-HW2 вҖ” H&W varijante) je veДҮ prethodno landovan
> sa `wildTriggerHoldAndWin + holdAndWinReelExpansion`. Ovaj Wave je
> **LEGO-BUY ekstenzija** koja sluЕЎa Boki-jevu ULTIMATIVNU direktivu вҖ”
> coverage-gap u multi-tier buy domenu (single-button вҶ’ menu/ladder).

>

> **2026-06-19 В· HEAD `5441531`** В· рҹҺ¬ Wave **F5-V3** landed вҖ” BIG-WIN TIER VISUAL LADDER POLISH
>
> ## рҹҺ¬ Wave F5 V3 вҖ” Big-win tier visual ladder polish (`bigWinTier.mjs`)
>
> Boki: *"nastavi"* вҖ” Pre-Math Roadmap priority рҹҘҲ V3 polish na veДҮ-solidnom
> `bigWinTier.mjs` (147 LOC default config + 200 LOC CSS + 500 LOC runtime).
>
> ### 5 polish atoma
>
> | # | Atom | Е ta dodato | Industry baseline |
> |:-:|:--|:--|:--|
> | 1 | **Per-tier banner rest-state scale** | `tierBannerScale: [0.85, 0.92, 1.0, 1.08, 1.15]` вҖ” TIER1 compact, TIER5 swells; `--bw-tier-scale` CSS custom prop sa cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) transition | hero-typography proporcija eskalira sa tier-om |
> | 2 | **Per-tier halo glow strength** | `tierHaloBlurPx: [8, 12, 18, 26, 36]` вҖ” geometric ladder, text-shadow blur eskalira; color = currentColor (inherits per-tier palette) | reach raste sa tier-om bez menjanja footprint-a |
> | 3 | **WCAG SC 2.3.1 AAA hard cap** | `wcagAaaPhotoSafe: true` (default ON) вҖ” shake period clamp вүҘ 333ms (вүӨ 3 Hz) regardless of GDD override; defense-in-depth | UKGC RTS / MGA RG / AGCO photosensitive-safe |
> | 4 | **TIER вүҘ 5 climax single radial pulse** | `tierClimaxPulseEnabled + Ms + MinTier` вҖ” one-shot `@keyframes` (0.6s expand+fade), `.is-climax` klasa applied na final tier mount; reduced-motion gate kill | anti-epilepsy compliant climax burst |
> | 5 | **Per-tier count-up curve** | `countUpEase: 'linear' / 'easeOutCubic'` sa `tierEaseMinTier: 4` вҖ” TIER1-3 linear baseline, TIER4-5 easeOutCubic za "decelerate-to-climax" | cinematic pacing reveal |
>
> ### Implementation atomic
>
> | Sloj | Е ta | LOC |
> |:--|:--|:-:|
> | defaultConfig | 7 nova polja + JSDoc kontrakt (svaki sa "Why" + industry-ref + GDD-overrideable note) | +35 |
> | resolveConfig | per-knob validation + clamp + photo-safe runtime gate (shakePeriodMs вүҘ 333 if active) | +45 |
> | emitBigWinTierCSS | per-tier scale (5 rules) + per-tier halo (5 rules) + climax pseudo-element + @keyframes + reduced-motion kill (4 new rules) | +60 |
> | emitBigWinTierRuntime | 4 nova var const (USE_EASE_OUT_CUBIC, TIER_EASE_MIN_TIER, CLIMAX_PULSE_ENABLED, CLIMAX_PULSE_MIN_TIER) + `_countUpLinear` easing gate + `_runCompound` 2 climax-pulse wire-points (mount + promotion) | +35 |
> | tests | 5 nova acceptance gates: knobs presence, photo-safe clamp, CSS scale+halo emit, climax pulse + reduced-motion kill, runtime vars + easeOutCubic formula | +60 |
> | **ОЈ** | | **+235 LOC** |

>

> Sve outline rules koriste 2-3px solid sa contrast-safe halo color (chipColor/haloColor/white), `outline-offset: 2px`. Komentar `WCAG 2.4.7 (F4 A2)` na svakom za audit-trail. Modal focus-trap veДҮ postojao u 5/6 mesta вҖ” verifikovano kroz Read pre add-a.

>
> | # | Fajl | Element | Politeness |

> | 1 | `moneyGrabGrid.mjs` | `.mgg-picks`, `.mgg-running` | polite + atomic |

> | 9 | `totalMultiplierChip.mjs` | `#tmcChip` | polite + atomic + dynamic aria-label |
>
> Severity logika: **assertive** = prize/bigwin/error (prekida SR), **polite** = counters/progress/ladder (ДҚeka). **atomic** gde se cela poruka mora ponovo proДҚitati (ne diff).

> **2026-06-19 В· HEAD `ee86503`** В· рҹҸҶ Wave **LEGO-FS3.3** landed вҖ” DEFERRED QA SWEEP
>
> ## рҹ”§ Wave LEGO-FS3.3 вҖ” Adapter wave (162 вҶ’ 164)
>
> Boki: *"sve redom pod 1"* вҖ” kreДҮem ULTIMATIVNO sa stvar #1 iz follow-up
> liste: FS3.3 adapter wave + bonus overlay mutex + 2 cross-block guards.
> Zatvara 4 deferred QA findings iz prethodnih wave-a.
>
> ### Blokovi (2 nova) + Cross-block guards (2)
>
> | # | Stavka | Е ta radi |
> |:-:|:--|:--|
> | A | `reelHeightAdapter.mjs` | Atomic grow/shrink reel column DOM. Consumes `onFsReelHeightEscalated` od fsReelHeightEscalation.mjs (FS3.2 deferred signal). Sync `reel.cells[]` array + update grid-row span. Mid-spin shrink guard. |
> | B | `bonusOverlayMutex.mjs` | Serial queue za 3 paralelna bonus overlay-a (matchThree/moneyGrab/pathBonus). Acquire-on-Requested, queue-or-reject, release-on-Ended, re-emit za sledeДҮi u redu sa `_viaMutex` re-entrant guard. |
> | C | `cascadingWildPersistence` guard | `_reAssertPins` skip ako `window.WWS_STATE.active === true` (walking owns wild-position mutation) |
> | D | `hexClusterEngine` guard | `_scan` skip ako meЕЎani grid `(.cell.hex` + `.cell:not(.hex)` + `GAME_EVAL_KIND === 'cluster')` вҖ” anti-double-pay sa rectangular clusterPaysEval |
>
> Plus: `walkingWildStepper.mjs` publish `WWS_STATE.active` flag (set u `_onFsTrigger`, clear u `_onFsEnd`) вҖ” canonical signal koji cross-block guards ДҚitaju.
>
> ### HookBus events (svi single-owner)
>
> | Event | Owner |
> |:--|:--|
> | `onReelHeightGrown` / `onReelHeightShrunk` | reelHeightAdapter.mjs |
> | `onBonusOverlayMutexAcquired` / `onBonusOverlayMutexReleased` | bonusOverlayMutex.mjs |
>
> ### Multi-agent QA вҖ” PASS_WITH_MINORS вҶ’ 4 fixes вҶ’ PASS
>
> 4 nalaza fixed pre commit-a (general-purpose subagent):
>
> | # | Severity | Fix |
> |:-:|:--|:--|
> | F1 | **CRITICAL** | Guard #C koristi canonical `window.WWS_STATE.active` (walkingWildStepper publish-uje flag pri FS lifecycle); prethodno `WALKING_WILD_STATE` was dead-code (nigde nije postavljen) |
> | F2 | MAJOR | reelHeightAdapter insert pre bottom buffer (cells[visibleRows+1]) sa `strip.insertBefore`, ne `appendChild` вҖ” pre fix-a fresh cells bili nevidljivi iza bottom buffer-a |
> | F4 | MINOR | bonusOverlayMutex `KIND_MAP_LIT` extract вҖ” emit runtime size redukovan (KIND_MAP inline 2Г— вҶ’ 1Г— top-level var) |
> | F5 | MINOR | hexClusterEngine guard preciznija вҖ” meЕЎani grid (hex + non-hex + GAME_EVAL_KIND='cluster') = clear highlights + skip; pure no-hex case veДҮ handled by `cells.length === 0` short-circuit |
>
> 1 nalaz deferred (F3 MAJOR): `cellStep`/`targetY` aktualizacija posle grow вҖ” teorijski risk, treba browser verification.

> | `fsReelHeightEscalation.mjs` | Svaki FS retrigger bumpa row count + visual chip | Signal-only вҖ” emit + RECT_REELS mutation, atomic visual restore se planira u FS3.3 sa reelEngine adapter API-jem |

Ostavljeno: state tracking + HUD chip + RECT_REELS.visibleRows mutation + canonical event emit. Atomic visual restore dolazi u FS3.3 sa `reelEngine.growReelHeight(reelIdx, newRows)` adapter API-jem. |

> | F4 | MED | pyramidGridEngine `_spin` flush-uje PREVIOUS pending FIRST pa onda nove (crashSpinEngine pattern) вҖ” anti-callback-swallow race. |
> | F2 | HIGH | pyramidGridEngine `onPyramidSpinResult` payload sad ukljuДҚuje `cells: [{reel,row,symbol}]` per JSDoc contract. |
> | F5 | MED | hexClusterEngine default tier1.minSize=4 (aligned sa default minClusterSize=4); tier1 sad uvek reachable. |

>
> ### Definicija "spreman" za svaki blok (15-taДҚka senior-grade checklist)
>
> 1. JSDoc 8-sekcija header (Purpose / Industry ref / Public API /
>    Lifecycle / Runtime contract / GDD config keys / Perf budget / a11y)
> 2. `defaultConfig()` Object.freeze + `resolveConfig(model)` sa bounds/clamps
> 3. `emitXxxCSS(cfg)` + `emitXxxMarkup(cfg)` + `emitXxxRuntime(cfg)` вҖ” empty stub kad disabled
> 4. Pure helper exportovan za testove
> 5. Single wired-once sentinel `window.__XXX_WIRED__`
> 6. Direct `HookBus.emit('eventName', payload)` single-quoted string literals
> 7. HookBus events registrovani u `tools/lego-gate.mjs EXPECTED_EMIT_OWNERS`
> 8. HW_STATE.active guard gde primenljivo
> 9. FSM phase guard / appliesIn knob (base/fs/both)
> 10. `prefers-reduced-motion` CSS guard
> 11. ARIA labels gde primenljivo
> 12. вүҘ 15 unit testova (covered: defaultConfig, resolveConfig bounds + invalid, emit shape, pure helpers edge cases, lego-gate compliance, vendor-neutral)
> 13. Wire-in u `buildSlotHTML.mjs` (import + CSS + Markup + Runtime)
> 14. Manifest regen + i18n entry + package.json test:blocks path
> 15. Multi-agent QA review pre commit-a (senior-grade / vendor-neutral / lifecycle / math)
>
> ### Multi-agent QA workflow (verifikovan kroz 8+ wave-a)
>
> 1. Implementation вҖ” paralelni agenti, jedan blok po agentu, template-driven
>    (mirror `perFsSpinMultiplier.mjs` ili `walkingWildStepper.mjs`)
> 2. Wire-in вҖ” buildSlotHTML + manifest regen + lego-gate + test:blocks +
>    grandfathered probe events ako orchestrator-emit
> 3. QA cycle вҖ” independent agent 4-dim review + vendor grep + full regression
> 4. Sweep вҖ” minor issues fix-uju se na licu mesta PRE commit-a (lesson from
>    WASH PASS #1 вҖ” UVEK source-verify pre dijagnoze)
> 5. Commit + master TODO mark LANDED + push
>

>
> ## рҹ§№ WASH PASS #3 вҖ” backlog systematic verification (2026-06-19)
>
> ## рҹ§№ WASH PASS #3 вҖ” backlog systematic verification (2026-06-19)
>
> Boki: *"sve refdom, ali nemoj da mi proopustas i da radis pogresne dijagnoze.
> nemoj da ti se desi opet slucajno. radi sve ultiamtivno sredom"*
>
> Posle WASH PASS #2 rollback-a, 7 items strategic backlog je dvostruko
> verifikovan source-check pre fix-a (lesson learned: WASH PASS #1 imao
> pogreЕЎnu dijagnozu ЕЎto je vodilo do dvostrukog emit-a). Rezultat:
> 1 stvarni fix + 6 RESOLVED u source (nije baЕЎ bilo bag-ova).
>
> | # | Item | Verdikt | Evidence |
> |:-:|:--|:--|:--|
> | 1 | `clusterPaysEval` event mismatch | **FIX** | emit-uje legacy `clusterPays:evaluated` ali clusterSizeMultiplier sluЕЎР° `onClusterPay` вҶ’ orphan listener. Dodato per-cluster `onClusterPay` emit paralelno + registered u lego-gate EXPECTED_EMIT_OWNERS |
> | 2 | `waysEval` / `payAnywhereEval` no emit | **BY DESIGN** | pure helpers, konzumenti zovu `window.detectWaysWins()` sync |
> | 3 | `anticipation.skipDuringFs` orphan | **RESOLVED** | runtime emit ima conditional na L443-444 вҖ” knob se ДҚita |
> | 4 | `pathAwareMultiplier` monkey-patch idempotent | **RESOLVED** | L445 `if (STATE.patched) return;` veДҮ postoji |
> | 5 | `pickYourFs` priority 35 vs `freeSpins` -30 | **INTENTIONAL** | 35 fires FIRST = mount BEFORE FS_INTRO (Еҫeljeno) |
> | 6 | `lockedSymbolFs` paint 3Г— | **INTENTIONAL** | defensive re-paint kontra engine clobber |
> | 7 | `stageBadge` + `winwaysIndicator` OPT_OUT | **PRESENTER** | imaju `HookBus.on` listenere вҶ’ gate ih ne fail-uje |
>
> ### Regression gates (sve zelene)
>
> | Gate | Status |
> |:--|:-:|
> | `test:lego` (7 invariants) | 7/7 вң… |
> | `test:blocks` aggregate (147 blokova) | EXIT 0 вң… |
> | `_lego-combination-probe` (A1-A4) | 0 violations вң… |
> | `clusterPaysEval.test.mjs` | 14/14 вң… |
> | `clusterSizeMultiplier.test.mjs` | pass вң… |
>
> **Impact:** clusterSizeMultiplier listener (Wave LEGO-M) sada zapravo
> fire-uje na svakom clusterPays spin-u, jer dobija canonical event sa
> pravilnim payload shape-om (`clusterSize`, `cells`, `symbol`, `payX`).

> **2026-06-18 night В· HEAD `406a63f`** В· Wave **LIFECYCLE-FIX** landed
>
> ## рҹҡЁ LIFECYCLE INTEGRITY FIX вҖ” 5 topology engines emit onSpinResult
>
> Boki: *"krenim ultimativno"* вҖ” fix najveДҮeg WASH PASS nalaza:
> **5 spin engina (crash, plinko, hex, slingo, wheel) NIKAD nisu
> emit-ovali `onSpinResult`** uprkos komentaru u svakom da
> *"onSpinResult is emitted by the dispatcher (reelEngine)"*.
>
> Sa istinom: na hex/wheel/slingo/plinko/crash topologijama,
> `reelEngine` NIJE u dispatch path-u вҖ” engines se okidaju direktno
> kroz `window.__SLOT_KIND_RUNSPIN__.<kind>`. Lifecycle chain je
> bio prekinut: **40+ downstream listenera** (multiplierOrb,
> mysterySymbolMultiplier, wildCollisionMultiplier, stickyWild, ...) je
> NIKAD pucao na ovim topologijama вҖ” silent broken lifecycle.
>
> ### Fix u svih 5 engina
>
> Svaki engine sada emit-uje `onSpinResult` u svom `_settle()` PRE
> nego ЕЎto izvrЕЎi pending callback. Payload:
>
> | Engine | Settle path | Extra payload field |
> |:--|:--|:--|
> | crashSpinEngine.mjs | `_settle()` posle counter-tick | `peak: <number>` |
> | plinkoSpinEngine.mjs | `_settleMs` setTimeout posle ball drop | вҖ” |
> | hexReelEngine.mjs | `hexTickAll()` final iteration | вҖ” |
> | slingoSpinEngine.mjs | `_settle()` posle column commit | `matchCount: <number>` |
> | wheelSpinEngine.mjs | `_onTransitionEnd()` posle wheel stop | вҖ” |
>
> Sve emit-uju `{ duringFs, topology, ...extra }`.
>
> ### LEGO ownership вҖ” multi-owner per topology
>
> `tools/lego-gate.mjs` `onSpinResult` ownership 1 вҶ’ 6: reelEngine +
> 5 topology engines. Single-owner bi zahtevao da reelEngine zna o
> hex/wheel/plinko ЕЎto ruЕЎi LEGO inkapsulaciju. Runtime: taДҚno 1
> engine ulazi u play (kind-dispatch) tako da efektivno ostaje
> single-owner po sesiji.
>
> ### Multi-agent QA (general-purpose) вҖ” verdict PASS_WITH_MINORS
>
> 3 nalaza fix-ovana pre commit-a:
>
> | # | Fix |
> |:-:|:--|
> | 1 | `catch (_) {}` вҶ’ `catch (e) { console.warn('[X] emit failed', e); }` u svih 5 (anti-silent-failure) |
> | 2 | Konzistentnost payload-a вҖ” sve engine sada ЕЎalju `topology` field |
> | 3 | crash dobio `topology: 'crash'` field (do tada samo `peak`) |
>
> Token guard race za 4 engina deferred вҖ” `STATE.pending` nullification
> veДҮ preventuje cascade; samostalna senior-grade wave.
>
> ### Test gates
>
> | Gate | Status |
> |:--|:-:|
> | NEW `_engineSpinResultEmit.test.mjs` (21 source-pin testova) | вң… 21/21 |
> | NEW `_engine-spinresult-live-probe.mjs` (Chromium Г— 5 topologies) | вң… 5/5 |
> | `test:lego` (7 invariants) | вң… 7/7 |
> | `test:parse:real-pdfs` (4 GDD) | вң… 4/4 |
> | `test:parity` (cross-game DOM) | вң… 0/18 violations |
> | `test:force-outcomes` (20 chip-outcomes) | вң… 20/20 |
>
> ### Impact
>
> Pre fix-a: bilo koji multiplier/wild/mystery LEGO blok je bio
> **mrtav** na hex/wheel/slingo/plinko/crash slotima. Posle fix-a:
> svi 40+ downstream listenera pucaju canonically, lifecycle chain
> intaktna na svim 5 topologijama.
>
